1000607010.english: Charlotte! I'm so excited! &n Haa... Look at the Commander's eyes! They're so big...
1000607010.korean: 샬럿! 나 완전 두근두근! &n하아... 사령관 눈 좀 봐! 저렇게 커지다니...

1000607011.english: Lugaru? What do you think of this?

1000607012.english: - Charlotte slowly ran her fingertips over the jewels on her chest, and her heart sank at the sound of the ornaments clinking.
1000607012.korean: - 샬럿은 손가락 끝으로 가슴 쪽의 보석을 천천히 훑었고,&n장식들이 짤랑거리는 소리에 가슴이 철렁했다.

1000607013.english: Oh... Th, Th... &n The one below looks better?
1000607013.korean: 오오... 그, 그보다...&n아래에 있는게 더 괜찮아 보이는데?

1000607014.english: Ahh... So this is what the Lugaru Duke wanted?
1000607014.korean: 아아... 루가루 공은 이게 갖고 싶었나 보군?

1000607015.english: ... However, if I remove this... will it be okay for Your Majesty's heart health...
1000607015.korean: ... 다만, 이걸 떼어내면... 폐하의 심장 건강에 괜찮을지...

1000607016.english: - Charlotte stroked the jewel and gave me a meaningful look.
1000607016.korean: - 샬럿은 보석을 쓰다듬으며, 내게 의미 심장한 눈길을 보냈다.

1000607018.english: Hehe! Look how flustered our commander is. What would have happened if he hadn't come here?
1000607018.korean: 후훗! 우리 사령관 당황한 것좀 봐. 여기 안왔으면 어쩔 뻔 했어.

1000607019.english: I'm fine... Your Majesty? Should I really stop? Really?

1000607020.english: - "War Wolf and Charlotte were very adept at expressing their true feelings. "No, are you used to teasing me? It would be troublesome for a Sirene to learn this...
1000607020.korean: - 워울프와 샬럿은 본심을 표현하는데 무척 능숙했다.&n아니, 날 놀리는데 익숙한 건가? 이걸 세이렌이 배우면 곤란한데...

1000607021.english: - But Sirene was holding Werewolf's gift in her small hand, lost in thought.
1000607021.korean: - 하지만 세이렌은 작은 손에 워울프의 선물을 쥐고. 곰곰히 생각에 빠져&n있을 뿐이었다.

1000607023.english: Commander? We found some troublesome guys up front.

1000607024.english: Hmm... I think our naval advance party missed it. Are you all too busy collecting gold coins?
1000607024.korean: 흐음... 우리 해군 선발대가 놓친 것 같은데, 금화 줍느라 다들 정신 없나봐?

1000607025.english: - As War Wolf said, I saw several AGS units approaching us. It seems that Triaina and her party were completely absorbed in the treasure hunt.
1000607025.korean: - 워울프의 말대로, AGS 몇기가 이쪽을 향해 다가오고 있는게 보였다.&n아무래도, 트리아이나 일행은 보물 찾기에 온정신이 팔린 것 같다.

1000607026.english: - The main unit would do well to come to its senses.

1000607027.english: - The battle was fought without difficulty, and the inside of the cave was once again filled with a lively atmosphere.
1000607027.korean: - 전투는 어렵지않게 치뤄냈고, 동굴 내부는 다시 떠들썩한 분위기에 휩싸였다.

1000607028.english: - The morale is high thanks to the continued victories, and if we proceed cautiously, there shouldn't be any major problems.
1000607028.korean: - 계속되는 승전으로 사기는 충분했고, 신중하게 나아간다면&n별다른 문제는 없을 것 같다.

1000607029.english: - ...But the 'sound' that Perrault heard continues to bother me.
1000607029.korean: - ... 다만 페로가 들었다는 그 '소리'가 계속해서 신경 쓰일 뿐.

1000607031.english: - It would be a good idea to have Triaina and Horizon, who are losing focus, join the main force, and reorganize the search party around Perrault...
1000607031.korean: - 집중력이 떨어진 트리아이나와 호라이즌을 본대에 합류시키고,&n페로를 중심으로 수색대를 재편성 하는게 좋겠지...

1000607032.english: - I was so caught up in the battle that I didn't even notice the Sirene approaching.
1000607032.korean: - 전투로 이것 저것 생각 하느라, 세이렌이 다가오는것도 눈치채지 못했다.

1000607034.english: ...If Commander were to receive a gift from someone... &n ...what kind of gift would you like to receive?
1000607034.korean: ... 사령관님께서 만약 누군가에게 선물을 받는다면...&n... 어떤 선물을 받고 싶으세요?

1000607035.english: - I was answering dryly because I was too busy worrying about the battle, but I couldn't help but stop in my tracks at the unexpected question.
1000607035.korean: - 전투를 신경쓰느라 건성건성 대답하던 나는 &n의외의 질문에 발걸음을 멈출 수 밖에 없었다.

1000607036.english: - Sirene followed, waiting for my answer in a somewhat reserved manner.
1000607036.korean: - 세이렌은 따라 서서, 다소곳한 자세로 내 대답을 기다리고 있었다.

1000607037.english: - If it's a gift you want to receive... I've never seriously thought about it. &n Actually, I've thought about it... but it's better not to talk about it.
1000607037.korean: - 받고 싶은 선물이라면... 한번도 진지하게 생각해 본 적 없다.&n사실 생각한 적은 있지만... 이야기하지 않는 게 좋겠지.

1000607038.english: - I can't give Sirene that answer...
1000607038.korean: - 세이렌에게 그런 대답을 할 수는 없으니...

1000607040.english: Yes? You mean something big and hot?

1000607041.english: - ... What's going on in my head since I saw May's fireworks a while ago? &n My true feelings came out without me realizing it.
1000607041.korean: - ... 얼마 전 메이의 폭죽을 본 이후로 내 머리가 어떻게 된 것일까?&n무심결에 본심이 나와버리고 말았다.

1000607043.english: Mr. War Wolf, could you spare me a moment?
1000607043.korean: 저... 워울프씨? 잠시 시간 내주실 수 있나요?

1000607044.english: - Sirene went straight to War Wolf and started talking about this and that.
1000607044.korean: - 세이렌은 곧장 워울프에게 다가가, 이런저런 이야기를 나누기 시작했다.

1000607045.english: - After listening for a while, War Wolf turned her head and gave me a meaningful smile. &n I hope there won't be any major accidents...
1000607045.korean: - 워울프는 한참을 듣더니, 고개를 돌려 내게 의미심장한 미소를 지어 보였다.&n큰 사고만 없으면 좋으련만...

1000607047.english: - After I stroked Perrault, I picked up a gold coin rolling around at my feet without thinking and held it in my hand.
1000607047.korean: - 나는 페로를 쓰다듬어준 뒤,&n별 생각 없이 발밑에 굴러다니는 금화를 하나 주워서 손에 쥐었다.

1000607048.english: - The gold coin was heavier than I thought, and its heaviness had an unknown power that made me feel good.
1000607048.korean: - 금화는 내 생각보다 묵직했고, 그 묵직함에는 기분을 좋게하는&n알 수 없는 힘이 있었다.

1000607049.english: - Let's roughly brush off the dirt from the gold coin. The gold coin in my palm sparkled and revealed its presence.
1000607049.korean: - 금화에 묻은 흙을 대충 털어내자.&n손바닥의 금화가 반짝이며 그 존재감을 드러냈다.

1000607051.english: - Suddenly, I thought it would be a waste to let the treasures sink to the bottom of the sea like this.
1000607051.korean: - 문득, 보물들이 이대로 바닷속으로 가라앉기에는 아깝다는 생각이 들었다.

1000607052.english: If it's inside the safe... you should be able to get there quickly.
1000607052.korean: 금고 내부라면... 금방 도착할 수 있을 겁니다.

1000607055.english: - Sirene, who had been shooting with the werewolf for a while...

1000607056.english: - Why didn't I answer Sirene's question seriously back then?
1000607056.korean: - 왜 나는 그 때 세이렌의 질문에 진지하게 답하지 않았지?

1000607057.english: [c][ffd130]... If Commander were to receive a gift from someone... &n ... what kind of gift would you like to receive?[-][/c]
1000607057.korean: [c][ffd130]... 사령관님께서 만약 누군가에게 선물을 받는다면...&n... 어떤 선물을 받고 싶으세요?[-][/c]

1000607058.english: - The words I said carelessly returned with an unexpected result.
1000607058.korean: - 내가 무심코 던진 말은, 예상치 못한 결과로 돌아왔다.

1000607059.english: Commander? Do you like my gift?

1000607060.english: - An old-fashioned iron box that Sirene brought in with a shaky expression. What was inside the box was...
1000607060.korean: - 세이렌이 쭈뼛거리며 가져온 고풍스러운 외관의 철제 상자.&n그 상자 안에 들어있던 것은...

1000607061.english: - It was a huge chain made of gold.

1000607062.english: - This huge gold piece, which was not enough for both my hands, and was wrapped around my forearms, was ridiculously shaped like a necklace.
1000607062.korean: - 내 양손으로 모자라, 팔뚝까지 가득 또아리를 틀고 있는 이 거대한 금붙이는&n정말 우습게도 목걸이의 형태를 하고 있었다.

1000607063.english: - There is no way to know who made this and for what purpose, but it succeeded in giving an eerie impression.
1000607063.korean: - 누가 무슨 의도로 이렇게 만들었는지는 알 방법이 없지만.&n섬뜩한 인상을 주는데는 성공했다.

1000607064.english: - It's just that the direction was different from mine, but this monster must have been someone's fantasy too...
1000607064.korean: - 나와 방향이 달랐을 뿐, 이 괴물도 누군가의 로망이었겠지...

1000607065.english: Commander? You don't look well... I'll take care of this for you...
1000607065.korean: 저... 사령관님? 안색이 좋지 않으세요... 제가 쓸데 없는짓을...&n제가 치워 드릴테니...

1000607066.english: - Sirene began to look at my expression with a worried face. &n I can't disappoint Sirene over something like this.
1000607066.korean: - 세이렌이 걱정스런 얼굴로 내 표정을 살피기 시작했다.&n겨우 이런 일로 세이렌을 실망시킬 순 없다.

1000607068.english: - I boldly put the chain around my neck, but &n this strange gold piece went past my pubic hair and down to my thighs, rippling.
1000607068.korean: - 나는 과감하게 체인을 목에 걸었지만,&n이 기괴한 금붙이는 내 명치를 지나, 허벅지까지 내려와서 출렁였다.

1000607069.english: - Maybe this monster needs to be wrapped around a few times before use? If not...
1000607069.korean: - 혹시 이 괴물은 몇 번 정도 감아서 써야 하는게 아닐까?&n그것도 아니라면...

1000607070.english: I'm so glad the Commander likes it...
1000607070.korean: 정말 다행이에요. 사령관님이 마음에 들어 하셔서...

1000607071.english: - Judging by Sirene's personality, she must have had a lot of worries and concerns before choosing this.
1000607071.korean: - 세이렌의 성격으로 미뤄봤을 때,&n이걸 선택하기 까지 수 많은 고민과 걱정을 했겠지.

1000607074.english: - Sirene seemed to have run all the way here carrying the box without even having time to shake off the dirt from her palms.
1000607074.korean: - 세이렌은 손바닥의 흙도 미처 털어내지 못한채,&n상자를 들고 여기까지 달려온 모양이다.

1000607075.english: - When I imagined the appearance of the Sirene, my heart was filled with gratitude.
1000607075.korean: - 세이렌의 모습을 상상하자, 고마움에 마음이 벅차 올랐다.

1000607077.english: - War Wolf stood at a distance, avoiding eye contact with me and pretending not to talk. She looked relaxed.
1000607077.korean: - 워울프는 멀찍이 서서, 나와 눈을 마주치지 않은채 딴청을 피워댔다.&n그 모습에서 여유로움이 묻어 나왔다.

1000607079.english: Hey guys? The Commander got a gift?

1000607081.english: Tch! I let my guard down.

1000607082.english: Yes? A gift? Where is it?

1000607083.english: No... Nong! Such horrible tastes! I, I can't understand this kind of culture! I'll get you something else right away!
1000607083.korean: 노... 농! 저런 끔찍한 취향이라뇨! 저, 저는 이런 문화는 이해할 수 없어요!&n제가 당장 다른 걸 구해 드릴게요!

1000607085.english: It's totally cool! After all, big and heavy is the best, right? Hehe! But Neri will find something even cooler and show it off! Just wait.
1000607085.korean: 완전 멋있잖아! 역시 크고 묵직한게 제일 좋지?&n히힛! 그치만 네리가 더 멋진걸로 찾아서 자랑할거야! 기다리라구.

1000607086.english: A majestic appearance... As expected... should I say, it's worthy of His Majesty?
1000607086.korean: 위엄있는 자태... 역시... 폐하 답다고 해야 할까요?

1000607087.english: I... was only thinking about something big and hot... &n I was foolish... wasting that time... on useless personal time...
1000607087.korean: 전... 크고 화끈한 거에서 다른 생각만 했는데...&n제가 어리석었어요... 그 시간을... 쓸데 없는 개인 시간으로 날려 버리다니...

1000607089.english: - War Wolf winks at me. I guess she wants me to acknowledge her contribution, right? It's frustrating, but I guess I have to acknowledge it.
1000607089.korean: - 워울프가 날 보고 눈을 찡긋한다. 아무래도 자신의 공로를 알아달라는 거겠지?&n분하지만 이 공로는 인정해야겠지.

1000607090.english: Our kids are so diligent... Oh my! Look at them smashing boxes over there...
1000607090.korean: 우리 애들 정말 부지런하기도 하지... 어머! 저기 상자 부수는 것 좀 봐...

1000607091.english: Oh my... there's dirt on your boots?

1000607092.english: - War Wolf started to act strange again, and I couldn't help but...
1000607092.korean: - 워울프는 다시 딴청을 피우기 시작했고, 나는 어쩔 수 없이...

1000607093.english: Huh? Commander, did you call me?

1000607097.english: Hehehe~. At that time, there were many things I hadn't done... &n This time, the commander had better be prepared too.
1000607097.korean: 후훗~. 그 땐 내가 못 해본게 좀 많아서...&n이번에는 사령관도 각오하는게 좋을거야.

1000607098.english: I wonder... what the two of you are talking about...
1000607098.korean: 저는... 두 분이서 무슨 이야기를 하시는지...

1000607099.english: Huh? Ahaha... No... What... Is there something like that?
1000607099.korean: 응? 아하하... 아니... 뭐... 그런게 있지?

1000607101.english: Oh, my! Neri! Can you please be careful?
1000607101.korean: 아이 참! 네리! 제발 조심해줄 수 없어?

1000607102.english: Neri saw the clueless Undine touch the sensor, but &n I'll keep it a secret!!
1000607102.korean: 네리는 눈치없는 운디네가 센서를 건드리는걸 봤지만,&n비밀로 해줄게!!

1000607104.english: No... Nong!!! More are coming?! Didn't Neri just make things worse? Wait, could AGS even be angry?
1000607104.korean: 노... 농!!! 더 많이 몰려오는걸?! 네리가 괜히 화만 돋운 거 아냐?&n잠깐, AGS가 화도 낼 수 있었나?

1000607105.english: Neri saw the cowardly Undine running away and tripping all the sensors, &n I'll pretend not to notice!
1000607105.korean: 네리는 겁쟁이 운디네가 도망치면서 센서를 모두 건드리는걸 봤는데도,&n모른척 해줄게!

1000607108.english: Huh? I came back after hearing the noise. What's going on? Are you okay? Are you okay?
1000607108.korean: 으엑? 소리 듣고 돌아 왔더니. 이게 무슨일이래?&n네리? 운디네? 괜찮아?

1000607109.english: Neri is always fine! I'm glad Undine is safe.
1000607109.korean: 네리는 늘 문제 없지! 운디네가 무사해서 다행이야.

1000607110.english: ... I'm sorry, Neri... I was too hasty back then... &n I didn't even know it was a sensor...
1000607110.korean: ... 미안해 네리... 그 땐 내가 너무 성급하게 굴었어...&n난 그게 센서인줄도 모르고...

1000607111.english: Heh! Undine has nothing to apologize for.

1000607114.english: Wow! That was pretty funny just now...

1000607119.english: I feel weird... Neri just... wants to go find the necklace...
1000607119.korean: 기분이 이상해... 네리는 그냥... 목걸이 찾으러 갈래...

1000607120.english: What... What? Then what the hell am I supposed to do?!
1000607120.korean: 뭐... 뭐? 그럼 대체 뭘 어떻게 해 줘야 되는거야?!

1000607121.english: Oh, come on! Neri! Stop right there!

1000607122.english: Horizon is really full of energy. I told you I picked a really good deputy expedition leader! Should I appoint Undine as the deputy expedition leader?
1000607122.korean: 호라이즌은 정말 기운이 넘쳐. 내가 부 탐사대장 하난 정말 잘 뽑았다니까!&n이참에 운디네를 부부 탐사 대장에 임명할까?

1000607124.english: - It seemed that the forward exploration team was just as excited as the main force.
1000607124.korean: - 보아하니, 전방의 탐사팀도 들떠 있는 건 본대와 다를 바 없는 듯 했다.

1000607125.english: Of course! I brought you here, so I'll take responsibility for it until the end.
1000607125.korean: 물론이지! 여기까지 데려 왔으니, 내가 끝까지 책임져 주겠어.

1000607127.english: Horizon always seems to be on good terms, even if their expressions of affection are a bit rough.
1000607127.korean: 호라이즌은 늘 사이가 좋아 보입니다.&n애정 표현 방식이 조금 거칠긴 하지만요.

1000607128.english: Yes, Horizon has a unique camaraderie.

1000607129.english: Mr. Perrault, you want to see your companions too, right?

1000607130.english: - Perrault hesitated at the mention of Sirene's companion.

1000607131.english: We are a little different from soldiers like Sirene.
1000607131.korean: 우린 세이렌 양 같은 군인들과는 조금 달라요.

1000607132.english: So, there's no sister I can really call a colleague...

1000607134.english: Excuse me, did I say anything rude to you, Mr. Perrault?
1000607134.korean: 저, 혹시 제가 페로씨에게 실례되는 말을 했나요?

1000607137.english: I just got a little pissed off because I thought of a maid peacefully napping in Orca.
1000607137.korean: 단지, 오르카에서 태평하게 낮잠을 자고 있을 어떤 메이드가 생각나서&n조금 약이 올랐을 뿐입니다.

1000607138.english: - Listening to Perrault's story, I somehow got hungry.
1000607138.korean: - 페로의 이야기를 듣고 있자니, 어쩐지 배가 고파졌다.

1000607139.english: - How is Hachiko spending her vacation? She said she's going to learn cooking from Sowan...
1000607139.korean: - 하치코는 휴가를 어떻게 보내고 있을까?&n소완에게 요리를 배울 거라고 하던데...

1000607140.english: Wait! ... Shh... Can you hear me?

1000607141.english: - Now that I think about it, this sound...

1000607144.english: Could it be a flying object...? No way!

1000607149.english: - Something was approaching at high speed inside the cave.
1000607149.korean: - 동굴 내부에서 무언가가 빠른 속도로 접근하고 있었다.

1000607150.english: - Was this the sound that Perrault was talking about?

1000607153.english: - Is it possible to maneuver like that in such a narrow space? &n How can you dodge all the bullets?
1000607153.korean: - 이런 좁은 곳에서 저런 기동이 가능할까? &n어떻게 모든 총알을 피해낼 수 있는 거지?

1000607155.english: - A robot with a black, ominous appearance appeared, cutting through the wind.
1000607155.korean: - 바람을 헤집고 검고 불길한 모습을 한 로봇이 모습을 드러냈다.

1000607156.english: Ah! You asked me who I was.

1000607157.english: Who is that? That's a question you can ask after confirming whether the person is a person. &n You could say that the person is a black robot whose identity is unclear to you.
1000607157.korean: 누구냐는 건 인격적 존재인지 확인한 후에 할 수 있는 질문이지요.&n전 인격적 존재가 당신에겐 명확하지 않은 검은 로봇이라고 할 수 있겠죠.

1000607158.english: I don't question your perceptual abilities. I just want to point out the contradiction in asking a robot "who" it is.
1000607158.korean: 전 당신의 지각적 능력의 의문을 품진 않습니다. &n단지 로봇에게 '누구'냐고 묻는 것에 대한 모순을 지적하고 싶은 것이지요.

1000607159.english: - The aftershock brought by the robot swept through the area.

1000607161.english: - Stop Sirene. I have the right to attack first. It won't be too late to attack after learning her purpose.
1000607161.korean: - 세이렌을 제지한다. 선공권은 내게 있다.&n녀석의 목적을 알고 나서 공격해도 늦지 않겠지.

1000607162.english: - A robot that greets politely while wiggling its gloves.

1000607163.english: On a night in a world on the brink of ruin, thanks to a master weary of the mundane, I was able to become a robot with a full personality.
1000607163.korean: 멸망한 세계의 밤, 진부한 것들에 지친 주인 덕분에 전 인격을 가진 로봇이 될 수 있었습니다.

1000607164.english: Look at this sight! It represents both good servants and evil messengers, depending on the fate of those who enter here.
1000607164.korean: 자! 이 모습을 보십시오! 이곳에 들어온 자들의 운명에 따라&n선한 종과 악한 사신 모두를 대변합니다.

1000607165.english: The sight of these black wings spread out speaks of the evil master's will, but also of hope through the golden, radiant parts.
1000607165.korean: 이 검은 날개를 펼친 모습은 사악한 주인의 의지와 동시에 금빛의 찬란한 부분을 &n통해 희망을 이야기하기도 합니다.

1000607166.english: To the unfortunate souls who come to this tomb, I offer death as the answer—I am known here as the Destroyer, or the Slayer of Thieves.
1000607166.korean: 이 무덤을 찾아온 불운한 자들에게 죽음이라는 해답을 내리는 &n전 이곳의 파멸자, 도둑들의 살해자라고 불리기도 하지요.

1000607167.english: Haha. I'm glad we can communicate. You are a smart and noble person. I'll give you my formal greeting.
1000607167.korean: 하하. 말이 통해서 다행입니다.&n영민하시고 귀하신 분. 정식으로 인사 드리겠습니다.

1000607168.english: My name is Roc. I am in charge of serving Angel Duke of the Leoboros family.
1000607168.korean: 제 이름은 로크. &n리오보로스 가문의 앙헬 공을 모시는 임무를 맡고 있죠.

1000607169.english: - The light on the face flashes ominously and looks around.
1000607169.korean: - 안면부의 발광체가 불길하게 번뜩이며 주위를 살핀다.

1000607170.english: If you want to get lost in vain hopes of destroying the intelligent being that will bring you good luck, I won't stop you.
1000607170.korean: 당신에게 행운을 가져올 지성체를 해치우려다 &n헛된 희망에 매몰되어 사라지길 원하신다면 굳이 말리지는 않겠습니다.

1000607171.english: Please watch your words. &n If you threaten Master, I will stop you immediately.

1000607172.english: - What's this robot's purpose? Why doesn't it attack us like the other AGS? Why does it insist on showing up in such a dangerous situation? It must have a purpose.
1000607172.korean: - 이 로봇의 목적은 뭐지? 어째서 다른 AGS처럼 우릴 공격하지 않는 거지?&n어째서 위험에 굳이 모습을 드러내는 거지? 분명히 목적이 있을 것이다.

1000607173.english: - Before I turn you into scrap metal, I want to know your purpose. &n Roc answered slyly.
1000607173.korean: - 고철로 만들기 전에, 목적을 알고싶다.&n로크는 능청스럽게 대답했다.

1000607174.english: This vault is the final resting place of Prince Angel. &n As the guardian of the tomb, I am tasked with eliminating any unfortunate intruders.
1000607174.korean: 이 금고는 앙헬 공의 마지막 안식처.&n저는 묘지의 수호자로 불운한 침입자를 제거하는 임무를 맡고 있습니다.

1000607175.english: However, I will inform you that there is a rude intruder who fell from the sky... and a traitor among us is under the control of that intruder... &n We will need the help of another intruder to deal with that traitor.
1000607175.korean: 다만, 하늘에서 떨어진 무례한 침입자와... 우리 중 배신자가 그 침입자에게 조종을 받아... &n그 배신자를 처치하기 위해 또 다른 침입자의 도움을 받아야 하는 상황이라고 알려 드리죠.

1000607177.english: Will you not make a deal with me to keep my oath without fail and to protect the nobility of this place until the day I die?
1000607177.korean: 헛되임 없이 맹세를 따라 지키며 언젠가 쇠할 때까지 이곳의 고결함을 수호하는&n저와 거래를 하지 않겠습니까?

1000607178.english: - Everyone is on edge due to the sudden appearance of AGS.
1000607178.korean: - 갑작스런 AGS의 등장으로 모두가 긴장한 상태.

1000607179.english: - Instead of attacking us, Roc offered us a deal.
1000607179.korean: - 로크는 우리를 공격하는 대신, 거래를 제안했다.

1000607180.english: The Leoboros family, chasing after empty fame and power, amassed... and even before their impending destruction, they greedily hoarded useless gold here, now forgotten by all.
1000607180.korean: 헛된 명성과 힘을 쫓아 리오보로스 가문이 쌓아온... 예정된 멸망을 앞두고도 &n게걸스레 쓸모 없는 황금을 이곳에 모은 이젠 모든 이들의 기억에 잊혀진 것들이죠.

1000607181.english: Master, it's a trap. You don't need to hear it.

1000607182.english: Hmm. Let me elaborate a bit... &n The deal is that you solve my problem.
1000607182.korean: 흠. 조금 더 풀어서 말씀 드린다면... &n제 문제를 해결해 주시는 게 거래의 조건입니다.

1000607184.english: Time is limited, and secrets hidden in the shadows always reveal the truth before your eyes. If you agree to the deal, I'll tell you.
1000607184.korean: 시간은 유한하고 그늘 속에 숨겨진 비밀은 언제나 값어치 있는 눈 앞에&n진실을 드러냅니다. 거래에 응하신다면 말씀 드리죠.

1000607185.english: - Roc doesn't seem to have any intention of backing down.

1000607186.english: Haha. That's good. As expected, you're a smart person.

1000607187.english: Let's get to the point. Here's the proposal.

1000607188.english: There's another brother here, a brother who fearlessly punishes those who invade this place, regardless of the world's right and wrongs and sorrows... but now he's gone mad.
1000607188.korean: 이곳엔 또 다른 형제가 있습니다. 세상의 시비와 비탄을 가리지 않고 &n겁 없이 이곳을 침입한 자들을 벌하는 역할을 맡은 형제... 하지만 지금은 미쳐 버리고 말았습니다.

1000607189.english: For some reason... If you kill my brother who has gone mad, I will give you all the goods here.
1000607189.korean: 모종의 이유로... 미쳐 버린 형제를 당신이 처치해 준다면&n이곳에 있는 모든 재화를 내어 드리도록 하겠습니다..

1000607190.english: Help me defeat the lawless brothers who betrayed their master by abandoning their duty and receive the reward of the now peacefully sleeping Duke Angel.
1000607190.korean: 저를 도와 도리를 저버리고 주인을 배신한, 무도한 형제를 무찌르고 &n이젠 고이 잠든 앙헬 공의 보상을 얻는 겁니다.

1000607191.english: - ...means to participate in the power struggle within the vault.
1000607191.korean: - ... 금고 내부의 세력 다툼에 참가하라는 뜻이다.

1000607192.english: Accept the deal. If you just get rid of my crazy brother... &n all the worthless wealth here will be yours. You have the power to do it.
1000607192.korean: 거래를 받아 들이시지요. 제 정신 나간 형제만 없앤다면...&n이곳에 있는 모든 헛된 재물이 당신의 것이 될 것입니다. 당신에겐 그럴 능력이 있고요.

1000607193.english: It is the proper duty of every butler to judge the character and abilities of his visitors.
1000607193.korean: 방문자의 인격과 그 능력을 가늠하는 것은 모든 집사의 올바른 도리지요.

1000607195.english: It is always better to have one friend and one enemy than two enemies. I am sure you are wise enough to know this.
1000607195.korean: 언제나 두 적보다는 하나의 친구와 하나의 적이 쓸모가 있는 법입니다.&n영민하신 분께선 잘 아시시라 믿습니다만.

1000607196.english: No. There is a way to leave only one enemy. &n That will happen if you don't keep your distance.
1000607196.korean: 아뇨. 하나의 적만 남기는 방법도 있습니다.&n당신이 거리를 벌리지 않으면 그렇게 될 겁니다.

1000607197.english: I guess your clever and wise master won't mistreat a visiting friend. Oh, time is running out.
1000607197.korean: 아무래도 당신의 영민하시고 지혜로운 주인은 찾아온 친구를 박대하지&n않을 것 같군요. 아 시간이 줄어들고 있군요.

1000607198.english: The shadows of the ghosts that have occupied this glorious and vain place and have chased after the good devil have followed me.
1000607198.korean: 이 영광되고 헛된 곳을 무도하게 점령하고 &n선한 악마를 쫓아온 망령의 그림자들이 저를 따라왔으니.

1000607199.english: - In the distance, several turrets were visible, aiming at the lock.
1000607199.korean: - 멀리서 터렛 몇기가, 로크를 조준하고 있는 모습이 보였다.

1000607200.english: If you'd like, I'd like to give you a chance to measure me up.
1000607200.korean: 원하신다면 당신에게 절 가늠할 기회를 드리고 싶습니다만?

1000607203.english: - I sat down roughly on the wreckage of the AGS and collected my thoughts.
1000607203.korean: - 나는 AGS의 잔해 위에 대충 걸터 앉아 생각을 정리했다.

1000607204.english: - Roc promised Angel's treasure in exchange for eliminating his rival. Why would he want to eliminate his rival?
1000607204.korean: - 로크는 경쟁자를 제거하는 대가로, 앙헬의 보화를 약속했다.&n그 경쟁자를 없애려고 하는 이유는 뭐지?

1000607205.english: - The conditions don't seem too bad. &n Having that robot, who knows this place well, as an assistant would definitely be helpful...
1000607205.korean: - 일단 조건은 나쁘지 않아 보인다.&n이곳을 잘 아는 저 로봇을 조력자로 둔다면 분명히 도움이 될 테니...

1000607206.english: Eww! Who, who are you?! ... Who, who are you?
1000607206.korean: 으엑! 너, 넌 누구야?! ... 누, 누구세요?

1000607207.english: They say it's Angel's robot that guards this place.

1000607208.english: Wait! You better not get too close!
1000607208.korean: 잠깐! 너무 가까이 가지 않는게 좋습니다!

1000607211.english: - A few curious people hovered around, keeping an eye on Roc.
1000607211.korean: - 호기심이 생긴 몇몇 인원들이 로크의 눈치를 살피며 주위를 서성였다.

1000607212.english: Oh! It's this guy? He looks like a crow? Anyway, you think you're lucky. If you had been hit by Neri, you wouldn't have been safe, right?
1000607212.korean: 앗! 이 녀석이구나? 까마귀 같이 생겼네?&n아무튼, 너 운 좋은줄 알어. 네리한테 맞았으면, 무사하지 못했을껄?

1000607213.english: Oh! I found a gold coin over there! It's a crow. Can I have it?
1000607213.korean: 앗! 저기 금화 발견! 까마귀야. 나 저거 가져가도 되지?

1000607214.english: Neri? Where are you going... Let's go together...

1000607215.english: Excuse me... Excuse me... Excuse me...

1000607216.english: Let me give you some space so you can gather your thoughts.
1000607216.korean: 생각을 정리할 수 있도록 자리를 비켜 드리지요.

1000607217.english: - Roc seemed uncomfortable with the curiosity of the people. &n No, do you not like being called a crow?
1000607217.korean: - 로크는 인원들이 호기심을 보이는 상황이 불편한 듯했다.&n아니, 까마귀라고 불리는 것이 마음에 들지 않는 건가?

1000607218.english: Master? I have an urgent request.

1000607219.english: A request for assistance from Captain May at base camp.
1000607219.korean: 베이스 캠프에서 메이 대장에게서 온 지원 요청입니다.

1000607222.english: - It seemed that Perrault didn't know anything about the unexpected.
1000607222.korean: - 예상치 못한 일에 페로도 아는 게 없는 것 같았다.

1000607225.english: - It seems that there were still enemies left that we were unable to eliminate.
1000607225.korean: - 아무래도 우리가 소탕하지 못했던 적들이 남았었던 것 같다.

1000607226.english: - I left the unit behind for now... but I hope there won't be any problems...
1000607226.korean: - 일단 부대를 남겨 놓긴 했지만... 부디 문제가 없어야 할 텐데...

1000607227.english: - There's no need to worry unnecessarily. I've prepared thoroughly just in case. Let's face it calmly.
1000607227.korean: - 괜히 걱정할 필요는 없다. 혹시나 하는 마음에 충분한 준비는 해두었으니.&n침착하게 대처하자.

1000607228.english: Haha. Are you retreating for now? Then I'll give you this.
1000607228.korean: 후후. 일단 후퇴하는 겁니까?&n그럼 이걸 드리죠.

1000607229.english: - I looked at the bottle Roc had handed me. &n ... It couldn't be a trap, could it...
1000607229.korean: - 나는 로크가 건내준 병을 살펴보았다.&n... 함정은 아니겠지...

1000607230.english: It is the most valuable and helpful legacy left to those made of cells. &n There happened to be one bottle left.
1000607230.korean: 세포로 이루어진 이에게 남겨진 것 중에는 가장 도움이 되는 값진 유산입니다. &n마침 한 병 남아 있었군요.

1000607231.english: If Duke Angel had been present, he would surely have gifted me that precious liquid as a token of his friendship.
1000607231.korean: 앙헬 공이 계셨다면, 분명 우호의 표시로 그 고귀한 액체를 선물해 주셨을테죠.

1000607232.english: - ...I couldn't know Roc's true intentions, but I decided to accept the favor.
1000607232.korean: - ... 로크의 본심은 알 수 없었지만. 나는 그 호의를 받기로 했다.

1000607235.english: Please give me a satisfactory answer.

1000607236.english: - After roughly finishing up work at the beach, we headed back to the cave.
1000607236.korean: - 해변에서의 일을 대충 마무리하고, 동굴로 돌아오는길.

1000607237.english: - I was able to meet Roc at the promised location.
1000607237.korean: - 나는 약속한 장소에서 로크와 대면할 수 있었다.

1000607239.english: - Leaving a brief greeting, Roc waited for a reply.
1000607239.korean: - 짧은 인사를 남기고, 로크는 대답을 기다렸다.

1000607241.english: - I chose to help Roc and take the treasure with pride.
1000607241.korean: - 나는 로크를 돕고, 당당하게 보물을 받아가는 방법을 선택했다.

1000607242.english: Haha. That's a wise choice from a smart person. Well, shall we get started?
1000607242.korean: 후후. 영민한 분의 현명한 선택입니다. 자 그럼 일을 시작해 볼까요?

1000607243.english: The most troubling thing about this tomb is the traps set inside. Thunder traps, capable of neutralizing even the most powerful enemies, are set inside.
1000607243.korean: 이 묘에서 가장 문제가 되는 건 안쪽에 설치된 함정입니다. &n어떤 강력한 적도 무력화시킬 수 있는 우레의 함정이 설치되어 있지요.

1000607244.english: This trap was set up inside for powerful enemies, just like you... who can sufficiently neutralize the outside guards and enter... &n
1000607244.korean: 이 함정은 바로 당신처럼... 외부의 경비를 충분히 무력화하고 들어올 수 있는...&n강력한 적들을 위해 내부에 설치되었으니까요.

1000607245.english: Most of the systems in this great tomb have been subjugated to the traitorous brother, but fortunately the traps operate independently, outside the control of the systems.
1000607245.korean: 이 위대한 묘에 있는 대부분의 시스템이 그 배반한 형제에게 귀속되었지만 &n다행히 함정은 시스템의 통제를 벗어나 독자적으로 작동을 하지요.

1000607246.english: Angel Duke didn't trust anyone. Not even the System. I've heard of a way to dismantle that trap before... and I can do it for you now.
1000607246.korean: 앙헬 공은 누구도 믿지 않았습니다. 시스템도 마찬가지지요.&n이전에 전 그 함정을 해체하는 법에 대해 들은 적이 있고... 지금 그렇게 해드릴 수도 있지요.

1000607248.english: - As soon as Roc finished speaking, he disappeared from sight in an instant.
1000607248.korean: - 로크는 말을 끝마치자마자, 순식간에 시야에서 사라졌다.

1000607249.english: Hiya! You're a very heavy and noisy guy, aren't you?

1000607250.english: But, he seems to be the type who is loyal to his master, so what do you think? Captain, don't you plan on trying to seduce the crow?
1000607250.korean: 그치만, 주인한테 충성하는 타입인것 같은데,&n어때? 캡틴은 까마귀를 꼬셔볼 생각 없어?

1000607252.english: I alone am more than enough to be your master's closest confidant. &n A robot of unknown identity...
1000607252.korean: 주인님의 최측근은 저 하나로도 충분합니다.&n정체를 알 수 없는 로봇 따위...

1000607253.english: But our pink cat can't fly like that crow, right?
1000607253.korean: 그치만, 우리 분홍 고양이는 저기 까마귀처럼 날아다니진 못하잖아?

1000607254.english: ...I just have to jump! It's just like flying... &n It's nothing.
1000607254.korean: ... 저, 점프하면 됩니다! 날아다니는 거 정도야...&n아무 것도 아닙니다.

1000607255.english: I can ride a sawfish and dive. &n Have you ever thought you were jealous of me?
1000607255.korean: 나는 소우피쉬를 타고 잠수도 할 수 있는데.&n혹시 내가 부럽다는 생각 해본적 없어?

1000607256.english: Oh, I never thought of that!
1000607256.korean: 그, 그런 생각 해본 적 없습니다!

1000607257.english: It's not like diving is impossible, but... &n ... for the sake of protecting Master... it might be a good idea to learn it for sure...
1000607257.korean: 딱히, 잠수가 불가능한 것은 아니지만...&n... 주인님의 경호를 위해서라면... 확실하게 배워 두는 게 좋을지도...

1000607258.english: - Perrault left with a cold expression. &n The sight of Perrault's hand holding the tube tightly, as if she might lose it, was impressive.
1000607258.korean: - 페로는 새침한 표정으로 자리를 떠났다.&n혹여나 놓칠세라 튜브를 꼭 잡고 있는 페로의 손이 인상 깊었다.

1000607259.english: - I turned around at the sound of a crash, and as expected, there was a Sirene following me.
1000607259.korean: - 나는 타박거리는 소리에 뒤를 돌아보았고,&n예상대로. 그곳에는 세이렌이 따라오고 있었다.

1000607262.english: That necklace is really nice, Commander.

1000607263.english: - To repay the smiling Sirene, I tapped the chain around my neck as if to show off.
1000607263.korean: - 활짝 웃는 세이렌에게 보답하기 위해 &n나는 보란듯이 목에 건 체인을 툭툭 건드려 보였다.

1000607264.english: Hehehe... I should have gotten you a bigger one.

1000607265.english: -Since coming to the island, Sirene has been smiling a lot more and looking even more lovable. If that's the problem, then it's that some people are starting to slander her...
1000607265.korean: - 세이렌은 섬에 온 뒤로 웃음이 부쩍 늘었고, 한층 사랑스러워 보였다.&n덕분에 세이렌을 음해하는 인원들이 몇몇 생겨나는 게 문제라면 문제겠지만...

1000607266.english: Oh! There's a radio call? Excuse me, can you all just be quiet for a moment?
1000607266.korean: 오우! 무전이 왔네? 미안한데, 다들 잠깐만 조용히 해줄래?

1000607268.english: - Triaina suddenly lowered her voice and began whispering to Neri.
1000607268.korean: - 트리아이나는 갑자기 목소리를 낮추더니 네리와 속닥거리기 시작했다.

1000607269.english: Oh! Then of course I should get ready. I'll tell the captain too. Oh, of course. Just wait a moment. You must never shoot first! Got it?
1000607269.korean: 오우! 그럼 당연히 준비 해야지. 캡틴한테도 이야기 해 둘게.&n아 물론이지. 잠깐만 기다리고 있어. 절대 먼저 쏘면 안 돼! 알겠지?

1000607270.english: Captain? I just got a call from Neri...

1000607272.english: Haha. You already shot it? As expected from Neri!

1000607273.english: It seems... we've encountered the enemy. Commander? I'll ask you to lead the charge.
1000607273.korean: 아무래도... 적과 마주친 것 같군요. 사령관님? 지휘를 부탁드릴게요.

1000607275.english: - The morale of the Orca crew, who had finished recharging, was great.
1000607275.korean: - 재충전을 마친 오르카의 인원들의 사기는 대단했다.

1000607276.english: Very good! Isn't this what a pirate is?
1000607276.korean: 아주 좋아! 이게 바로 해적 아니겠어?

1000607278.english: Lord Lugaru? Can you spare me a moment?
1000607278.korean: 루가루 공? 잠시 시간을 내줄 수 있나?

1000607279.english: Hmm? That's fine. What's going on?
1000607279.korean: 음? 그건 문제 없는데. 무슨 일이야?

1000607280.english: It's just that... &n I need your opinion on the jewels.
1000607280.korean: 다름이 아니라...&n보석에 대해 공의 의견이 필요하네.

1000607282.english: You're not really going to take that off, are you?!
1000607282.korean: 정말 그걸 떼서 줄려고 하는건 아니겠지?!

1000607283.english: Hehehe, one jewel for my soul sister...
1000607283.korean: 후훗, 영혼의 자매에게 보석 하나 쯤이야...

1000607284.english: I want to give the jewel below that the Duke of Lugaru wanted.
1000607284.korean: 나는 루가루공이 원하던 아래 쪽의 보석을 선물해 주고싶네.

1000607285.english: - Then Charlotte gave me a hot gaze. &n I wonder if... Charlotte is doing this simply because she wants to get rid of it...
1000607285.korean: - 그러면서 샬럿은 내게 뜨거운 눈길을 보냈다.&n혹시... 샬럿은 단순히 저걸 떼 내고 싶어서 저러는 게 아닐까... 하는 의심이 든다.

1000607286.english: But... if that's the case, wouldn't we need something else to replace this jewel?
1000607286.korean: 다만... 그리 한다면, 이 보석을 대신할만한 다른 무언가가 필요하지 않겠나?

1000607287.english: Haha... I guess that's what we should do within the bounds of common sense, right?

1000607288.english: Hehe. So I prepared a few things... &n ... but I can't help but feel that they're all a little disappointing in size...
1000607288.korean: 후훗. 그래서 내가 몇 가지 준비해 본게 있지만...&n... 하나같이 크기가 조금씩 아쉬운건 어쩔 수 없더군...

1000607289.english: What do you mean by "the size is a pity"?

1000607291.english: Your Majesty? Your Majesty? Where are you going?

1000607292.english: - I escaped with Sirene from the bikini-clad pirates.
1000607292.korean: - 나는 비키니 복장의 해적들로부터 세이렌을 데리고 빠져나왔다.

1000607293.english: Commander? You don't look well. Are you okay?
1000607293.korean: 사령관 님? 안색이 좋지 않아요. 괜찮으세요?

1000607294.english: - I don't think it'll be possible for me to protect Sirene from the dangerous Orca alone.
1000607294.korean: - 나 혼자서 험난한 오르카로부터 세이렌을 지키는건 힘들 것 같다.

1000607296.english: - Even though I called Perrault, I had no idea how to explain it.
1000607296.korean: - 막상 페로를 부르긴 했지만, 어떻게 설명을 해 줘야 할지 감이 서질 않았다.

1000607298.english: - ... No. I need to explain it more precisely so Perrault can understand...
1000607298.korean: - ... 아니야. 좀 더 정확하게 설명해야 페로가 이해할 수 있겠지...

1000607299.english: Yes, is that what you mean?

1000607301.english: As long as I'm watching, those two corrupted people won't bother Miss Sirene.
1000607301.korean: 제가 지키고 있는 한. 저 타락한 두 사람이 세이렌 양을 괴롭히는 일은 없을 거예요.

1000607302.english: - Perrault, who smiled confidently at me, looked truly trustworthy.
1000607302.korean: - 날 보며 자신만만하게 웃음짓는 페로는 정말 믿음직해 보였다.

1000607303.english: Then, Master? May I continue to guide you?
1000607303.korean: 그러면 주인님? 제가 계속해서 안내해도 될까요?

1000607304.english: - I walked with Perrault and Sirene.
1000607304.korean: - 나는 페로, 세이렌과 함께 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1000607305.english: - There are no major dangers in the cave, except for the AGS. It must have been thanks to Roc's intervention.
1000607305.korean: - 동굴에서 AGS들만 제외하면, 큰 위험요소는 없다.&n분명 로크가 손을 어느정도 써 준 덕이겠지.

1000607306.english: - I turned my head and surveyed the main unit. The atmosphere was bustling. The Orca personnel seemed completely accustomed to exploration.
1000607306.korean: - 나는 고개를 돌려 본대를 살폈다.&n시끌벅적한 분위기. 오르카의 인원들은 탐사에 완전히 익숙해진것 같다.

1000607307.english: Haa haa... How have you been, Captain? Haa...
1000607307.korean: 하아 하아... 캡틴 잘 있었어? 하아...

1000607308.english: - The advance party's Triaina was breathing heavily.

1000607309.english: That's right... That's right... I was trying to keep up with Neri's excited pace... &n Whew... Anyway...
1000607309.korean: 맞아... 맞아... 신난 네리 속도에 맞추다보니...&n후우... 그건 그렇고...

1000607310.english: Okay! Everyone, pay attention? I've got something awesome for you!
1000607310.korean: 자! 다들 여기 주목해 볼래? 내가 굉장한걸 가져왔어!

1000607311.english: - Triaina's excited voice echoed through the cave. Had she discovered something remarkable?
1000607311.korean: - 트리아이나의 들뜬 목소리가 동굴을 울렸다. 뭔가 대단한걸 발견한 걸까?

1000607312.english: Who wants to eat the special sausage prepared by New Triaina??
1000607312.korean: 뉴 트리아이나가 준비한 특제 소시지 먹을사람??

1000607313.english: Since it was a special edition, not many were available, so if you're interested, you'd better hurry!
1000607313.korean: 무려 특제라서 많이 구하지 못했으니까,&n관심 있는 사람은 빨리오는게 좋아!

1000607314.english: Wow...! Your sense is really good?

1000607316.english: Well, of course, being the expedition leader will do. Anyway, thank you~.
1000607316.korean: 뭐, 아무렴 탐사대장이면 되겠지. 아무튼 고마워~.

1000607318.english: That must be a grilled sausage, right?

1000607320.english: Commander, I have something to tell you.

1000607321.english: - Looking at Sirene's eyes, I think I know what she's trying to say. Does this child want to eat sausages too? Or maybe she wants to socialize.
1000607321.korean: - 세이렌의 눈빛을 보니, 뭘 말하려는지 대충 알 것 같다.&n이 아이도 소시지를 먹고 싶은 걸까? 아니면 사람들과 어울리고 싶어서인지도 모르겠다.

1000607323.english: - Triaina skillfully lit a bonfire, and people began to gather around it one by one.
1000607323.korean: - 트리아이나는 능숙하게 모닥불을 피웠고,&n그 둘레로 인원들이 하나둘씩 모이기 시작했다.

1000607324.english: - It's a beautiful sight. Seeing everyone chatting regardless of their affiliation warmed my heart.
1000607324.korean: - 좋은 풍경이다. 소속에 관계없이 수다를 떠는모습에 마음이 저절로 따뜻해졌다.

1000607325.english: - ... He showed up as if ignoring my feelings.
1000607325.korean: - ... 그런 내 기분을 무시하듯 그녀석은 모습을 드러냈다.

1000607326.english: Such a relaxed look. You're truly a generous person.
1000607326.korean: 이렇게 여유로운 모습이라니. 정말 대범하신 분이군요

1000607327.english: I warned you, didn't I? Please stay away from my master.
1000607327.korean: 내가 주의를 줬을텐데요? 주인님에게서 떨어져 주십시오.

1000607328.english: - Perrault reacted sensitively, &n But Roc continued speaking without even looking at Perrault.
1000607328.korean: - 예민하게 반응하는 페로, &n하지만 로크는 페로를 거들떠 보지도 않고 말을 이어갔다.

1000607329.english: There's no time to listen to the whining of the feline Bioroid, who's currently snuggled in her owner's arms. I have urgent news.
1000607329.korean: 지금의 주인의 품에 안겨 부비적거리는 고양이과 바이오로이드의 응석을 들어줄&n시간이 없군요. 급한 소식이 있습니다.

1000607331.english: Hoho... &n Finally... my crazy brother noticed our presence and started to move.
1000607331.korean: 후후...&n드디어... 제 미친 형제가 우리의 존재를 알아채고 움직이기 시작했습니다.

1000607332.english: If it's the crazy brother... is it another robot?
1000607332.korean: 미친 형제라면... 또 다른 로봇 말인가요?

1000607335.english: - A scream echoed from deep within the tomb.

1000607336.english: The core of the graveyard has been taken over by puppets who follow the orders of my crazy brother. Can I explain after I defeat them?
1000607336.korean: 묘지의 코어를 차지하고 제 미친 형제의 명령을 받는 꼭두각시들이 몰려오는군요.&n설명은 저것들을 물리친 뒤에 해도 되겠습니까?

1000607337.english: - As if in response to the scream, the AGS began to rush towards us.
1000607337.korean: - 괴성에 반응한듯 AGS들이 본대로 몰려오기 시작했다.

1000607338.english: - First of all, we need to prepare for battle.

1000607339.english: - The battle was won, but an unprecedented enemy came.
1000607339.korean: - 전투에서 승리했지만, 전에 없던 정적이 찾아왔다.

1000607340.english: - Maybe it's because everyone heard that scream.
1000607340.korean: - 아마도 모두가 그 괴성을 들은 탓이겠지.

1000607341.english: My brother is finally fully awake. He senses our approach.
1000607341.korean: 드디어 제 형제가 완전히 깨어났습니다. &n우리가 접근하는것을 감지했군요.

1000607343.english: Although I was in the honorable position of protecting the legacy of Angel Duke.
1000607343.korean: 앙헬 공의 유산을 지키는 영광된 자리에 있었지만.

1000607344.english: A pitiful being infected by a 'monster' that came down from the sky, and even forgot his duty to protect his legacy.
1000607344.korean: 하늘에서 내려온 '괴물'에 감염되어,&n유산을 지킬 의무조차 망각해버린 가엾은 존재.

1000607345.english: Now is the time to free that brother from suffering and dishonor.
1000607345.korean: 이제 저 형제를 고통과 불명예에서 해방시켜줄 때입니다.

1000607346.english: If it came down from the sky...

1000607347.english: Yes... that would definitely be a worm.

1000607348.english: - It seems that Roc and the brothers mentioned were unable to stop the Metal Parasite's attack.
1000607348.korean: - 로크가 언급한 형제와 로크는 철충의 습격을 막을 수 없었던 모양이다.

1000607349.english: - At that moment, a dangerous aura flowed out from Roc.

1000607350.english: Yes, but don't get me wrong.

1000607351.english: It doesn't matter that he was my brother in the past. Any act that tarnishes the legacy of the Duke Angel is unforgivable.
1000607351.korean: 과거에 그가 제 형제였던 것은 중요하지 않습니다.&n앙헬 공의 유산을 더럽히는 행위는 용서할 수 없습니다.

1000607352.english: - Now I think I have a rough idea of ​​what's going on.
1000607352.korean: - 이제 대충 어떻게 되어가는 일인지 알 것 같다.

1000607353.english: - Roc... seems to have wanted to use our hands to finish off his brother. If he's a brother... would he be the same type of machine as Roc?
1000607353.korean: - 로크는... 우리의 손을 빌려 형제를 마무리하고 싶었던 것 같다.&n형제라면... 로크와 같은 기종일까?

1000607354.english: Angel Duke always used to point out this bad habit of mine.
1000607354.korean: 앙헬 공은 저의 이 나쁜 버릇을 늘 지적하곤 하셨죠.

1000607355.english: It's sudden, but do you remember our deal?

1000607356.english: - Defeat Roc's infected brother and gain the right to possess the treasure.
1000607356.korean: - 로크의 감염된 형제를 쓰러트리고, 보물을 가질 권리를 얻는다.

1000607357.english: I will give you the opportunity to return with the treasures you have acquired so far.
1000607357.korean: 지금까지 얻으셨던 보화를 가지고 돌아갈 수 있는&n기회를 드리겠습니다.

1000607358.english: A chance to escape from that powerful brother with only gold.
1000607358.korean: 금만 가지고 저 강대한 형제에게서 빠져나갈 기회 말입니다.

1000607359.english: - So he's telling me to run away from here, but he'll turn a blind eye to the treasure. &n Surely... he thought he'd find out his brother was awake and deal with him himself?
1000607359.korean: - 보물은 눈감아 줄테니, 여기서 도망치라는 뜻이군.&n설마... 형제가 깨어난 걸 알고 자신이 직접 상대하겠다고 생각한 건가?

1000607360.english: Captain? Shouldn't we call Horizon? The crow wants to face it alone... but if it's the same type of aircraft, the infected one is much stronger, right?
1000607360.korean: 캡틴? 호라이즌을 불러야 하지 않을까?&n까마귀는 혼자 상대하고 싶어 하지만... 같은 기종이면 감염된 쪽이 훨씬 쎄잖아?

1000607362.english: Master, then... are you helping this robot? I don't understand why you would take such a risk...
1000607362.korean: 주인님, 그럼... 이 로봇을 돕는 겁니까? 굳이 그런 위험을...&n이해할 수 없습니다.

1000607363.english: I'm the one who can't understand. I told you the safe way...
1000607363.korean: 저야말로 이해할 수 없군요. 제가 안전한 길을 알려드렸는데 말이죠..

1000607364.english: To be honest... based on my assessment of your strength... I think it would be better for me to choose the last option...
1000607364.korean: 솔직히 말씀 드리면... 제가 판단한 당신들의 힘으론... &n제가 마지막 방법을 선택하는 게 나아 보입니다만...

1000607365.english: - There's no need to take the risk.

1000607366.english: - Vacations should be enjoyed safely. That's why...
1000607366.korean: - 휴가는 안전하게 즐겨야 한다. 그런 이유로...

1000607368.english: What the hell is this can talking about?!
1000607368.korean: 이 깡통이 무슨 말도 안되는 소리를 하고있는거야?!

1000607370.english: Just go back without knowing what's in the safe? Who are you talking about now?
1000607370.korean: 금고 안에 뭐가 있는지도 모른채 그냥 돌아 가라고?&n지금 누구 약올리는거야?

1000607371.english: Commander, just say you're going. I'll call you a loser for the rest of my life! Where's that drunken, scheming image of you?
1000607371.korean: 사령관도 그냥 가겠다는 말 꺼내기만 해봐. &n평생 졸장부라고 놀릴 테니까! 술에 취해 날 휘어잡던 모습은 어디 간 거야?

1000607372.english: Alcohol? What are you talking about? Oh! That wasn't the point. Master... What would you like to do? I think it's safer...
1000607372.korean: 술? 무슨 말씀인가요? 아! 그게 중요한 게 아니었죠.&n주인님... 어떻게 하시겠습니까? 제 생각엔 아무래도 안전하게...

1000607373.english: - Perrault insists on the safe path... War Wolf insists on the dangerous but rewarding path.
1000607373.korean: - 페로는 안전한 길을... 워울프는 위험하지만 얻을 게 많은 길을 주장한다.

1000607374.english: - Originally, I was going to choose the safe path... but in one corner of this island, the Metal Parasites and the controlled &n AGS pose a great threat.
1000607374.korean: - 본래는 안전한 길을 선택하려 했지만... 이 섬의 한 구석에 철충과 조종을 받는&nAGS는 큰 위협이 된다.

1000607375.english: - Besides, this safe is a safe where you never know what Angel might have hidden... &n If you think about Angel as a person...
1000607375.korean: - 게다가 이 금고는 앙헬이 무엇을 숨겨 놓았을 지 모르는 금고...&n앙헬이라는 인간을 생각한다면...

1000607377.english: - I don't know what that legacy is, but I have no intention of giving it up to Angel.
1000607377.korean: - 그 유산이 뭔지는 모르지만 앙헬에게 양보할 생각은 없다.

1000607378.english: Cellular life forms are always caught up in mysterious passions and make foolish choices. Well, if that's the case... I won't stop you any longer.
1000607378.korean: 세포 생명체들은 항상 불가사이한 격정에 휩싸여 어리석은 선택을 하는군요.&n뭐, 그렇다면야... 저도 더 이상 말리지 않겠습니다.

1000607379.english: The road is dangerous enough, so please follow carefully...

1000607380.english: - Roc thought for a moment, then accepted our help without raising any objections. &n Surely... Is this because it's a robot that seems to have emotions but prioritizes reason?
1000607380.korean: - 로크는 잠깐 생각하더니 별 이의를 제기하지 않고 우리의 도움을 받아 들였다.&n확실히... 감정이 있어 보여도 이성이 우선하는 로봇이라 이건가?

1000607381.english: As expected of the Commander! It wasn't a dream that you took me under your wing that night! Can I call you 'Manly Man' from now on? Yes?
1000607381.korean: 역시 사령관이야! 그날 밤에 날 휘어잡고 복종시킨 건 꿈이 아니었어!&n이제부터 사령관을 '상남자'라고 불러도 돼? 응?

1000607382.english: - Werewolf is chatting excitedly next to me. &n Then, while we're going... I need to think about why Roc tried to make us retreat.
1000607382.korean: - 옆에서 워울프가 신이 나서 떠들고 있다. &n그럼 일단 가면서... 로크가 우리를 물러나게 하려고 한 원인을 생각해 봐야겠다.

1000607383.english: - Black and red columns and a metal floor that looks as cold as obsidian... &n This is the vault of Angel Leoboros, who divided the world into three and ruled over one of them.
1000607383.korean: - 검고 붉은 열주와 마치 흑요석처럼 차갑게 보이는 금속제 바닥...&n여기는 세계를 세 개로 나눠 그 중 하나를 지배했던 앙헬 리오보로스의 금고다.

1000607384.english: - What did Angel want that made him build his vault in such an ominous structure?
1000607384.korean: - 앙헬은 무엇을 원했기에 이렇게 불길한 건축물에 자신의 금고를 세웠을까?

1000607385.english: - Roc was concentrating on something in a strange posture. It seemed like he was removing the trap he had been talking about.
1000607385.korean: - 로크는 기묘한 자세로 뭔가에 집중하고 있었다.&n아무래도 자신이 이야기했던 함정을 제거하고 있는 것 같다.

1000607386.english: - Roc stands up and fires lightning from his wings... disabling the traps one by one.
1000607386.korean: - 로크는 일어선 채로 그 날개에서 전격을 내뿜어... 함정들을 하나하나 무력화시킨다.

1000607387.english: - It was as if God or the devil had called down lightning to destroy the obstacles blocking his path.
1000607387.korean: - 그건 마치 신이 또는 악마가 자신의 앞길을 막는 장애물을 &n번개를 불러 파괴하는 것 같은 모습이었다.

1000607388.english: Haha... You're here? You arrived sooner than expected.

1000607389.english: - ...Has Roc been dismantling traps like this all along?
1000607389.korean: - ...로크는 여태 이런 식으로 함정을 해체하고 있었던 건가?

1000607390.english: The curiosity of all living things can lead to harm. &n If you come any closer, we cannot guarantee your safety.
1000607390.korean: 모든 생명체가 가지는 호기심은 그 생명체를 다치게 하지요.&n더 이상 가까이 오시면 안전을 보장해 드릴 수 없습니다.

1000607391.english: Captain?! You were here? I picked up another special sausage over there!
1000607391.korean: 캡틴?! 여깄었구나? 내가 저쪽에서 특제 소시지를 또 주웠어!

1000607393.english: Wow! Cool! Crow! What are you doing? Are you practicing your poses? Want to join us?
1000607393.korean: 우와! 멋져! 까마귀야! 뭘 하고 있는 거야?&n혹시 포즈 연습이야? 같이 할까?

1000607395.english: ...I'm dismantling a trap that's harmful to your creatures. &n Stop right there!
1000607395.korean: ... 너희 생명체들에게 해가 되는 함정을 해체하고 있는 중이다. &n거기서 멈춰!

1000607396.english: Up close, it's much bigger, isn't it? Yeah, yeah, can you carry me and fly? With you, I could become an explorer who conquers the land, sea, and air...
1000607396.korean: 가까이서 보니까, 훠얼씬 크잖아? 있지 있지 나 태우고 날 수 있어?&n너만 있으면 난 육해공 삼세계를 정복한 탐험가가 될 수 있을 것 같은데...

1000607397.english: Triaina? That robot is performing important tasks. Wouldn't it be better to keep it focused?
1000607397.korean: 트리아이나? 저 로봇은 중요한 업무를 수행하고 있습니다. &n정신을 집중하게 두는 게 좋지 않을까요?

1000607398.english: - I took a step away from Roc, pulling Perrault and Triaina's hands.
1000607398.korean: - 나는 페로와 트리아이나의 손을 끌고 로크로부터 한발 떨어졌다.

1000607399.english: Oh, oh? Bold! Captain!!! Then I'll tell Captain...
1000607399.korean: 오, 오우? 과감해! 캡틴!!! 이러면 나 캡틴한테...

1000607403.english: By the way, the behavior patterns of living beings are certainly diverse. They are definitely different from Angel Duke. &n Do you feel bad about losing them? They are just artificial life forms?
1000607403.korean: 혹시, 확실히 생명체들의 행동 패턴은 다양합니다. 앙헬 공과는 확실히 달라요.&n저들을 잃는 것이 아까우십니까? 그저 인공 생명체일 뿐인데?

1000607404.english: - Roc's voice is low and muffled.

1000607405.english: - Only after hearing Roc's words did the outline of the man named Angel begin to take shape.
1000607405.korean: - 로크의 말을 듣고서야, 비로소 앙헬이라는 남자의 윤곽이 잡히는 듯 했다.

1000607407.english: Interesting. Did my question offend you?
1000607407.korean: 흥미롭습니다. 혹시 제 질문이 당신을 불쾌하게 했습니까?

1000607409.english: - There was a moment of silence, and Roc answered.

1000607410.english: Angel Duke was fair to everyone.

1000607411.english: Anyone who brought gold was entitled to a proper reward. This was true for corporations and nations alike. Even the value of Bioroids and robots was determined by it.
1000607411.korean: 금을 가져온 사람은 그에 합당한 보상을 받을 수 있었습니다.&n기업이든, 국가든 예외는 없었죠. 심지어 바이오로이드와 로봇의 가치도 그것으로 정해졌습니다.

1000607412.english: Whether you bring gold or keep it, your value is determined by it. &n And...!
1000607412.korean: 금을 가져다 주거나 지키거나 그것으로 가치는 정해졌습니다.&n그리고...!

1000607413.english: - Suddenly, sparks flew up from the floor, and I reflexively pushed Triaina and Perrault back.
1000607413.korean: - 바닥에서 갑자기 스파크가 튀어올랐고 나는 반사적으로 트리아이나와&n페로를 뒤로 밀쳐냈다.

1000607414.english: - As the trap quieted, Roc slowly raised his massive body.
1000607414.korean: - 함정이 잠잠해지자, 로크는 천천히 그 거대한 몸을 일으켜 세웠다.

1000607415.english: Angel Duke was much stronger than you. He wasn't afraid of losing Bioroids, humans, or robots.
1000607415.korean: 앙헬 공은 당신보다 훨씬 강했습니다. 바이오로이드도, 사람도, 로봇도&n잃는 것을 두려워 하지 않으셨지요.

1000607416.english: And so, you were able to rule over that world that was filled with barbarism. &n Hmm... It seems that the trap dismantling work has awakened my brother's subordinates.
1000607416.korean: 그렇게 해서, 야만으로 가득찼던 그 세계를 지배하실 수 있었습니다.&n흠... 아무래도 함정 해체 작업이 제 형제의 부하들을 깨운 것 같군요.

1000607418.english: Wow! I just realized... crows are amazing!
1000607418.korean: 우와! 난 이제야 알았는데... 까마귀 대단해!

1000607419.english: - Roc continues to observe me even as the AGS approaches. As if trying to engrave my memory... What is he recording about me?
1000607419.korean: - 로크는 AGS가 접근하는 와중에도 계속해서 나를 관찰하고 있다.&n마치 나에 대해 기억을 새겨두려는 것처럼... 녀석은 나의 무엇을 기록하고 있는 걸까?

1000607420.english: - Oh, now is not the time to be thinking about that.
1000607420.korean: - 아차 지금은 그걸 생각하고 있을 때가 아니지.

1000607421.english: Yes, sir. &n Bioroids... all ready for battle!
1000607421.korean: 네. 알겠습니다. 주인님.&n바이오로이드... 모두 전투 준비입니다!

1000607422.english: I was nervous because it was a safe, but they were such weak guys? I just wasted my bullets.
1000607422.korean: 금고라고 긴장 했더만, 이렇게 약해 빠진 녀석들이었어?&n총알만 낭비했네.

1000607423.english: - The belligerent War Wolf has become even more belligerent since arriving at the vault. &n Somehow, it seems like she is gradually becoming a real pirate.
1000607423.korean: - 호전적인 워울프는 금고에 도착한 이후로 더욱 호전적으로 변했다.&n어쩐지 점점 진짜 해적이 되어 가는 것 같다.

1000607424.english: Come on! The pirates are coming! Those who can bear weapons, come at me. Everyone else, bury your heads in the ground!
1000607424.korean: 자자! 해적이 왔노라! 무기를 들 수 있는 녀석들은 덤비고&n나머지는 전부 땅에 머리를 쳐박으라고!

1000607425.english: What an interesting female Bioroid creature.

1000607426.english: Oh, a female!!! Commander!! Are you talking about something that only the two of us knew? We agreed to keep that a secret!
1000607426.korean: 아, 암컷이라니!!! 사령관!! 우리 둘만 알던 그걸 이야기 한 거야?&n그건 비밀로 하기로 했잖아!

1000607427.english: Hey... crow? What are you thinking about?
1000607427.korean: 저기... 까마귀야? 지금 무슨 생각하고 있어?

1000607428.english: - Triaina began to tap Roc's thick gloves.
1000607428.korean: - 트리아이나는 로크의 두터운 장갑을 톡톡 건드리기 시작했다.

1000607429.english: I don't understand what you're talking about. Female is a term that only refers to humans. &n But isn't the term female generally used for Bioroids?
1000607429.korean: 무슨 이야기인지 모르겠군요. 여성은 인간 만을 지칭하는 말입니다.&n바이오로이드에겐 암컷이라는 명칭이 일반적으로 사용됩니다만?

1000607430.english: Oh... Really? You didn't hear that somewhere, did you? &n But... did that female thing come from a human named Angel?
1000607430.korean: 그... 그래? 어디서 들은 건 아니란 거지? &n그런데... 그 암컷이란 말 혹시 그것도 앙헬이라는 인간이 가르쳐 준 거야?

1000607431.english: - As Triaina continued speaking, she continued to knock on the lock and observe.
1000607431.korean: - 트리아이나는 말을 이어가면서, 계속해서 로크를 두들기고, 관찰했다.

1000607432.english: Exactly. The cool-headed Angel Duke always knew how to distinguish between noble beings... &n And what does that knocking gesture mean?
1000607432.korean: 정확합니다. 냉철한 앙헬 공은 언제나 존귀한 존재를 따로 구분할 줄 알았으니...&n그리고 그 두드리는 행동은 무슨 의미죠?

1000607434.english: ... ... I don't know what it means.

1000607435.english: Alright! Roc! Open the hatch! We'll destroy the enemy together!
1000607435.korean: 좋아! 로크! 해치를 열어줘! 우리 함께 적을 없애는 거야!

1000607436.english: Lord of the Bioroids... Could you please stop this pointless behavior?
1000607436.korean: 바이오로이드들의 주인이시여.&n... 이 무의미한 행동을 멈추게 해 주실 수 있으십니까?

1000607438.english: - I raised my hand and pointed at Triaina.

1000607439.english: Hello? I'm New Triaina. Nice to meet you. I'm the expedition leader of the Orca.
1000607439.korean: 안녕? 뉴 트리아이나야. 만나서 반가워.&n오르카 호의 탐사 대장을 맡고 있지.

1000607440.english: I don't understand. &n Usually, the position of leader should be given to someone smarter than others...
1000607440.korean: 이해할 수 없군요. &n보통 이끄는 자의 직책은 다른 이들보다 영리한 이들에게 주어야 할 텐데...

1000607442.english: This is the New Triaina Expedition Captain. &n Your orders are Roc. Get something cool from the fridge.
1000607442.korean: 여기는 뉴 트리아이나 탐사 대장이다.&n명령이다 로크. 냉장고에서 시원한 걸 꺼내 와.

1000607443.english: I don't understand. It's an incomprehensible order. &n And, I'm not following your master.
1000607443.korean: 알 수가 없군요. 이해할 수 없는 명령입니다.&n그리고, 전 당신 주인을 따르는 이가 아닙니다.

1000607444.english: Please, refrain from doing so. My actions are at the behest of Duke Angel, and I am following his final orders. If you need anything, please make a formal request.
1000607444.korean: 부디, 자제하시길. 제 행동은 앙헬 공에게 귀속되어 있고&n앙헬 공의 마지막 명령을 따르는 것이니. 혹시 필요한 게 있다면 정식으로 요청하십시오.

1000607445.english: According to the alliance... I will give it to you if you pay a reasonable price. Of course, there will be contracts and negotiations involved.
1000607445.korean: 동맹에 따라... 합당한 대가를 치르면 내 드리죠.&n물론, 거기엔 계약과 교섭이 따를 터입니다만.

1000607446.english: - Roc remained unmoved by Triaina's mischievous pranks. &n definitely... In this way, he feels like a robot.
1000607446.korean: - 트리아이나의 짖궂은 장난에도 로크는 미동이 없었다.&n확실히... 이런 면에선 로봇이라는 게 느껴진다.

1000607447.english: If you have something to say... please say it logically and politely. &n Female Bioroid.
1000607447.korean: 말하고 싶은 게 있다면... 논리적으로 정중하게 말해 주기 바랍니다.&n암컷 바이오로이드.

1000607448.english: Ahh... As expected! There's no respect! He's so different from the Captain.
1000607448.korean: 아아... 역시! 리스펙트가 없엉! 캡틴이랑 달라도 너무 달라.

1000607450.english: Don't you know respect? Respect! We need respect between us. As individuals.
1000607450.korean: 리스펙트 몰라? 존중! &n우리 사이에는 존중이 필요해. 인격체끼리 말이야.

1000607452.english: I understand. Fortunately, there was nothing wrong with my circuit.

1000607453.english: So you wanted to let me know that your master treats the Bioroids like human beings.&nI understand.
1000607453.korean: 당신의 주인은 바이오로이드를 사람처럼 취급한다는걸 알리고 싶었군요.&n그런 거라면 이해했습니다.

1000607454.english: Certainly, in the past, there were customers just like you. People who embraced Bioroids and treated them as if they were their own spouses.
1000607454.korean: 확실히 과거엔 분명 당신과 흡사한 부류의 고객들도 있었습니다.&n바이오로이드를 끌어안고, 마치 자신의 배우자인 것처럼 대하는 이들이었죠.

1000607455.english: And Angel Duke called those kinds of customers hypocrites. Poor people who treat things like people because they have nowhere to give affection.
1000607455.korean: 그리고 앙헬 공은 그런 부류의 고객들을 위선자라 불렀습니다.&n애정을 줄 데가 없어 물건을 마치 사람처럼 대하는 가련한 자들이라고.

1000607456.english: Wow! The worst! This is worse than any boss I've ever seen! Hey, Captain?
1000607456.korean: 우와! 최악! 옛날에 봤던 상관보다 더 구려! 저기, 캡틴?

1000607457.english: I'm thirsty. Can I get something cold from the fridge?
1000607457.korean: 나 목말라. 냉장고에서 시원한 거 하나만 줄 수 있어?

1000607458.english: - ...Where the hell is the refrigerator here... &n I know what Triaina wants to say to Roc, but...
1000607458.korean: - ...대체 여기 냉장고가 어딨다고...&n트리아이나가 로크에게 하고 싶은 말은 알겠지만...

1000607459.english: Really? Then I guess there's nothing I can do. Thank you, Captain! &n By the way... Captain, where on earth did the coconuts come from?
1000607459.korean: 그래? 그럼 어쩔 수 없지. 고마워. 캡틴!&n그나저나... 캡틴은 코코넛이 대체 어디서 나온거야?

1000607460.english: Hmm. Is this... some kind of role-playing game? If so, I can understand... but obviously, there are those types of customers too...
1000607460.korean: 흐음. 지금 이건... 일종의 역할극입니까? 그거라면 이해할 수 있습니다만...&n분명히 그런 부류의 고객도...

1000607461.english: - Roc's light began to flicker rapidly again.

1000607462.english: It's not like... it's a difficult story about the relationship between Bioroids and humans. It's just... respect, right? The captain respected me.
1000607462.korean: 그... 바이오로이드랑 인간의 관계같은... 그런 어려운 이야기가 아니고.&n그냥... 존중이라니까? 캡틴이 날 존중해 준 거야.

1000607463.english: Even if you’d asked him for a favor instead of a deal, I bet the Captain would have agreed. Well, that is, as long as he didn’t think it was too dangerous.
1000607463.korean: 네가 거래가 아닌 부탁을 했어도. 캡틴은 아마 들어줬을걸?&n뭐, 크게 위험하지 않다고 생각했을 때만이라면 말야.

1000607464.english: I don't get it. Respecting things...

1000607466.english: Did you say Triaina? I have a question for you.

1000607467.english: You memorized my name in one go. You're smarter than a werewolf, aren't you? &n The crow is totally cool!
1000607467.korean: 내 이름을 한번에 외우다니. 워울프보다 똑똑하잖아?&n까마귀 완전 멋져!

1000607468.english: I'm still here. Do you want to get in trouble?

1000607469.english: Triaina? Have you abandoned your noble duty? To serve your master?
1000607469.korean: 트리아이나? 당신은 고귀한 의무를 저버린 겁니까?&n주인에게 봉사한다는?

1000607470.english: No. The Captain... well... more of a leader than a master... and he's not forcing anything on us, is he? Of course, if he gives orders, we have to follow...
1000607470.korean: 아니. 캡틴은 ... 음... 주인이라기 보단 대장인데...&n우리한테 뭘 강요하는 것도 아니고? 물론 명령하면 우린 따라야겠지만...

1000607471.english: Ah! So that's a new way of building relationships. I guess I'll have to update the database. Well, at least I understand.
1000607471.korean: 아! 새로운 방식의 관계를 구축한 것이었군요.&n데이터베이스 갱신을 해야겠습니다. 뭐, 어쨌든 '이해'는 했습니다.

1000607472.english: - At my words, Roc began to move. &n But his eyes, or rather, his light, were shaking.
1000607472.korean: - 내 말에 로크는 움직이기 시작했다. &n하지만, 그의 눈, 아니 발광체는 흔들리고 있었다.

1000607473.english: The sun is exploding, the temperature is exploding... It's such a nice day... &n But...
1000607473.korean: 태양도 폭발하고 기온도 폭발하고... 아주 좋은 날씨야...&n그런데...

1000607474.korean: ... 거기 이 폭발하는 태양을 방해하는 건 누구지?

1000607475.english: No... I don't care who you are. I'm telling you in advance, this is my body's place. If you block out the sunlight carelessly...
1000607475.korean: 아냐... 네가 누구든 상관 없어.&n미리 말해두는데, 여긴 이 몸의 자리야. 함부로 햇볕을 가렸다간...

1000607476.english: First of all... I'm not in a position to block the captain's sunlight.
1000607476.korean: 일단... 저는 대장의 햇볕을 가리는 위치에 있지 않아요.

1000607477.english: Isn't it not me who is blocking the sunlight, but the captain's dark sense of victimization?
1000607477.korean: 햇볕을 가리는건 제가 아니라, 대장의 그 어두운 피해의식이 아닐까요?

1000607478.english: Huh! Who was that arrogant guy interrupting my body's rest?
1000607478.korean: 흥! 건방지게 이몸의 휴식을 방해하는 녀석이 누군가 했더니...

1000607479.english: That slender upper body, as fragile as it is respectable...

1000607481.english: Hehehe. Are you going to keep talking?

1000607483.english: Should I guess what the captain is trying to say? Hmm... It's definitely... 'How do you have such long, slender legs?', right? Hehe...
1000607483.korean: 대장이 하고싶은 말을 제가 맞춰볼까요? 으음... 그건 분명...&n'어떻게 넌 그렇게 길고 늘씬한 다리를 가지고 있는거지?'겠죠? 후후...

1000607484.english: Hey, how frivolous!! What the hell is that outfit? Explain it! &n Soo, don't call it a swimsuit! A swimsuit doesn't show through when it's wet!
1000607484.korean: 겨, 경박해!! 대체 그 복장은 뭐지? 어서 설명해봐!&n수, 수영복이라고 하지마! 수영복은 물에 젖었다고 속이 비치진 않는다구!

1000607485.english: Hmm... Well? Anyway, it's definitely an outfit that will appeal to my charm.
1000607485.korean: 으음... 글쎄요? 어쨌든 제 매력을 어필할 수 있는 복장인 건 확실하군요.

1000607486.english: That outfit is a disgrace to Doom Bringer! Why don't you change into it quickly?!
1000607486.korean: 그런 복장은 둠 브링어의 수치야! 얼른 갈아입지 못해?!

1000607488.english: Was everyone out here sunbathing? The weather was really nice, wasn't it?
1000607488.korean: 다들 여기서 일광욕 하고 있었어? 날씨 정말 좋지?

1000607489.english: Fortune... Technician?! What the heck is that?! I can see right through it even before it gets wet!
1000607489.korean: 포츈... 기술관?! 그, 그건 뭐야! 젖기 전에도 훤히 보이잖아!

1000607490.english: Oh, really... When you stare at me like that, I feel a little embarrassed, don't you?
1000607490.korean: 아이 참... 그렇게 빤히 쳐다보면 언니 조금 부끄럽거든?

1000607491.english: Fortune Technician, are you thinking of jumping into the sea?

1000607492.english: Of course~! You love summer, right?

1000607493.english: This is a sea with developed coral reefs... so you're going to go there and play with tropical fish?
1000607493.korean: 여긴 산호초가 발달한 바다니까... 거기로 가서 열대어랑 놀고 올거거든?

1000607494.english: Orca is in the summer, so I don't know either. If it's urgent, you can just go to the doctor. Are you going?
1000607494.korean: 오르카는 여름이라 언니도 잘 모르겠거든?&n급하면 닥터를 찾으면 되거든? 언니 간다?

1000607496.english: You see, Captain? It's a waste of time to worry about face these days.
1000607496.korean: 보셨죠 대장? 체면 운운하기에는 날씨가 아까워요.

1000607497.english: No matter how tightly blocked the colon is, you wouldn't want to waste this 'opportunity' that came your way wearing a combat uniform, would you?
1000607497.korean: 대장이 아무리 꽉 막혀 있어도, 운 좋게 찾아온 '기회'를 전투복을 입고&n보낼 생각은 아니겠죠?

1000607499.english: It's not often that you get the chance to vacation on a tropical island. I'd love to visit Triana and say thank you.
1000607499.korean: 남국의 섬에서 휴가를 보낼 수 있는 기회가 그리 흔하진 않죠.&n트리아이나를 찾아가서 감사인사를 하고 싶을 정도에요.

1000607500.english: ...Yeah... &n You're right. I was too retarded back then.
1000607500.korean: ... 그래...&n네 말이 맞아. 그땐 내가 너무 물렀어.

1000607501.english: Huh? What are you talking about?

1000607502.english: Back then... if only I had been a little bolder. By now, the Commander and...
1000607502.korean: 그 때... 내가 조금만 더 과감했더라면. 지금쯤 사령관과...

1000607503.english: ...What are you imagining? Your face looks so off, get a grip, Captain.
1000607503.korean: ... 무슨 상상을 하는 거죠? 얼굴이 기분 나쁘니 정신 차리세요 대장.

1000607504.english: The commander is not at the base camp, so the captain...

1000607505.english: It's noisy. Okay. I've decided. I was going to hold back and just sunbathe, just in case some insects pop out...
1000607505.korean: 시끄러워. 좋아. 결심했어. 혹시라도 튀어나올 철충들 때문에 &n일광욕 정도로 참으려 했더니...

1000607506.english: It's a foolish and uncharacteristic thought. &n I'll make sure everything is in order and dress comfortably for the commander...
1000607506.korean: 나답지 않은 무르고 어리석은 생각이야.&n확실하게 모조리 정리하고 마음 편한 복장으로 사령관을...

1000607509.english: Suddenly... you're... trying to disturb the beehive?

1000607510.english: Yeah. I'll clean everything up. Then I can have some peace of mind.
1000607510.korean: 그래. 모두 정리할 거야. 그래야 나도 마음 편하게 놀 수 있겠지.

1000607511.english: If there's a beehive, wouldn't burning it be Doom Bringer?
1000607511.korean: 벌집이 있으면 태우는 게 둠 브링어 아니겠어?

1000607512.english: Ugh... the coconut was really, really bad... oily... and not very refreshing...
1000607512.korean: 으에... 코코넛은 정말 정말 맛없었지 말입니다...&n기름지고... 별로 시원하지도 않고...

1000607513.english: It's really weird! I'm sure the canned version was incredibly delicious... But I'm glad I can enjoy it with peace of mind now that the Metal Parasites have all been cleared out.
1000607513.korean: 정말 이상함다! 분명 캔에 담긴건 엄청 맛있었는데 말입니다...&n그래도 철충이 싹 정리됐으니... 맘 편하게 즐길 수 있어 다행이지 말임다.

1000607514.english: I can't believe it's been so long since the battle ended that you're running around like this. It's not even enough to clean up the battlefield... You're just picking up coconuts...
1000607514.korean: 전투가 끝난지 얼마나 되었다고 이리 사고를 치고 다니는지 모르겠군요.&n전장 정리를 해도 모자랄 판에... 코코넛이나 줍고 다니다니...

1000607516.english: At that time, I was in a state of panic, so I didn't get to meet Colonel Phoenix. But before your squad gets into any bigger trouble, I wanted to interview them...
1000607516.korean: 그 때는 경황이 없어, 피닉스 대령을 만나지 못했지만.&n그쪽 분대가 더 큰 사고를 치기 전에, 면담을...

1000607517.english: Oh! Colonel Night Angel knew me? This would be an absolute honor!
1000607517.korean: 엇! 나이트 앤젤 대령님이 저를 알고 계셨슴까?&n이거 완전 영광이지 말임다!

1000607518.english: ...Are you by any chance one of the 2,056 Brownies who was deployed to the jungle with me? &n That... rude leprechaun squad.
1000607518.korean: ... 혹시 저와 같이 정글에 배치되었던 2,056 브라우니가 아닌가요?&n그... 무례한 레프리콘이 편성된 분대 말이에요.

1000607519.english: Huh? You mean the squad with 2,056 brownies? That squad! They're known for being completely reckless. Should I go find them for you now?
1000607519.korean: 엥? 2,056 브라우니가 있는 분대 말임까?&n그 분대! 완전 막나가기로 유명하지 말임다. 제가 지금 찾아 드림까?

1000607520.english: ... No, no. There's no need for that. I guess I misunderstood. &n I'm sorry for the misunderstanding.
1000607520.korean: ... 아뇨, 아녜요. 그럴 필요 없어요. 제가 착각했나 보군요.&n오해해서 미안해요.

1000607521.english: I won't report this separately, so until the Commander returns, just quietly focus on building sandcastles on the beach.
1000607521.korean: 이번 일은 따로 보고하지 않을테니, 사령관님이 복귀하실 때까지&n해변에서 얌전히 모래성을 만드는데 집중해 보세요.

1000607522.english: Of course! If I put my mind to it, I could even build a bunker!
1000607522.korean: 물론이지 말임다! 제가 마음만 먹으면 벙커도 만들 수 있지 말임다!

1000607523.english: Haha... I'll look forward to it.

1000607524.english: Brownies!? Brownies 2,056! You're here! I've been looking for you for a while.

1000607527.english: If it's coconuts, I'll leave the box behind... &n Next time, please... Please, don't do anything dangerous.
1000607527.korean: 코코넛이라면 제가 박스채로 두고 갈테니까...&n다음부턴 제발... 제발, 위험한 짓 좀 하지 마세요.

1000607531.english: I, I have an urgent mission, so I'll be off now!
1000607531.korean: 저, 저는 급한 임무가 있어서 이만!

1000607534.english: Coconut... Would you like some with it...?

1000607535.english: No. I have a better idea. First, dig 2,056 sand. Dig very, very deep, deep enough to fit your body.
1000607535.korean: 아니요. 제게 더 좋은 생각이 있어요. 우선 2,056은 모래를 파주세요.&n몸이 들어갈 수 있을만큼, 아주... 아주 깊게 파주세요.

1000607536.english: I... I miss Captain Marie... Please send me...
1000607536.korean: 저... 마리 대장님이... 보고싶슴다... 제발 보내주십쇼...

1000607537.english: Adjutant? You intend to come all the way here and harass a helpless soldier, especially one on leave? And a soldier from another unit, at that?
1000607537.korean: 부관? 여기까지 와서 힘없는 병사를, 그것도 휴가기간의 병사를 괴롭힐 생각이야?&n그것도 다른 부대의 병사를?

1000607538.english: Rather, prepare to apply some oil or something to my body. To brainwash the Commander, I need to get a proper tan from the sun that melts into a proper, splendid glow.
1000607538.korean: 그것보단 내 몸에 기름이나 바를 준비를 하라구. 사령관을 뇌살시키기 위해선&n적절한 화려하게 융합하는 태양으로 적절하게 태닝할 필요가 있으니.

1000607540.english: I made up my mind after hearing the Colonel's words. Come to think of it, there's no need to wrap a body like mine up so tightly, right? Even if I ordered it from Audrey, she'd make it right away.
1000607540.korean: 대령의 말을 듣고 결심했지. 생각해보니 나 정도 되는 몸으로 꽁꽁 싸맬 필욘 없잖아?&n그러지 않아도 오드리에게 주문하니 금방 만들어 주던데?

1000607541.english: ... What a lewd sight, not like a girl. &n No matter how much you want to seduce the commander, what if you take everything off?
1000607541.korean: ... 소녀답지 않은 음탕한 모습이군요.&n아무리 사령관을 유혹하고 싶어도 전부 벗어버리면 어떻게 하나요?

1000607542.english: Huh! Are you regretting it now?

1000607543.english: Anyone can see that the current situation is that the adjutant is jealous of my nice body. &n Honestly, I feel a little sorry for the adjutant.
1000607543.korean: 지금 상황은 누가봐도, 부관이 나이스한 내 바디를 질투하는 모양새인데.&n솔직히 부관에게 조금 미안한 느낌도 들어.

1000607544.english: Jealousy? Don't get carried away. And on top of that, you're saying sorry!! &n I don't know at all?
1000607544.korean: 질투라니요. 넘겨짚지 마세요. 게다가 미, 미안하다니!! &n전혀 모르겠는데요?

1000607545.english: I guess it's hard to admit.

1000607546.english: Your soldier? I'd like to hear your opinion. Are you sure my adjutant is jealous of me right now?
1000607546.korean: 그쪽의 병사? 나는 네 의견이 듣고싶어.&n내 부관이 지금 날 질투하는게 확실하지?

1000607547.english: Yes? Are you, are you talking about me?

1000607548.english: It's simple, right? Think of a class system. &n Oh, you don't have to do that. Just say what you feel.
1000607548.korean: 심플하잖아? 계급도를 떠올려봐.&n아, 그럴 필요도 없겠다. 그냥 느낀 그대로를 말하라고.

1000607549.english: I, I'll go get a shovel... I suddenly feel like digging a trench...
1000607549.korean: 저, 저는 삽을 구해오겠슴다... 갑자기 참호가 파고 싶어졌습니다...

1000607550.english: Captain Marie... Leprechaun Squad Leader... Where are you...?
1000607550.korean: 마리 대장님... 레프리콘 분대장님... 어디 계심까...

1000607551.english: Eww~! It's been a while since I went into the ocean, and I feel really good, sis.
1000607551.korean: 으으응~! 오랫만에 바다에 들어갔더니, 언니 기분 완전 좋거든?

1000607552.english: I'm not going to go into Orca until sunset today, am I? Serpent, are you ready to play with your sister?
1000607552.korean: 오늘은 해질때까지 오르카에 안들어 갈꺼거든?&n서펀트도 언니랑 놀 준비됐어?

1000607553.english: Yep! Of course! I'm okay anytime!

1000607554.english: Hehehe. That's how we become Serpents! Then... let's see who else will join us...
1000607554.korean: 후훗. 그래야 우리 서펀트지!&n그럼... 또 같이 할 사람이... 보자…

1000607555.english: Found it! Daphne~! Is it here? Just come this way? Fortune kept looking for it~!
1000607555.korean: 찾았다! 다프네~! 여기거든? 이쪽으로 오면 되거든?&n포츈 언니가 계속 찾았~어~용~!

1000607557.english: Wow! I almost didn't recognize who this was. Is that really the gardener?
1000607557.korean: 햐! 이거 누군지 못알아볼뻔 했네. 정말 정원관리사 아가씨 맞아?

1000607558.english: Ah, hello Mr. Serpent... I'm always grateful to you.
1000607558.korean: 아, 안녕하세요 서펀트씨... 늘 신세지고 있어요.

1000607559.english: By the way... Mr. Fortune? Where is the Commander? I heard you needed shade...
1000607559.korean: 그런데... 포츈씨? 사령관님께선 어디 계시죠?&n그늘이 필요하시다고 들었는데...

1000607560.english: Hohoho! The Commander just went to the cave to look for treasure? &n There's nothing here~Dragon~!
1000607560.korean: 후후훗! 사령관님은 지금 보물 찾으러 동굴에 갔거든?&n여긴 없어~용~!

1000607561.english: Yes? That won't do... Sister Lise will get angry... &n I... I'll go back for a moment.
1000607561.korean: 네? 그러면 안되는데.. 리제 언니가 화를 낼 텐데.. &n저... 저 잠시만 돌아가 볼게요.

1000607562.english: What if it doesn't work? Today, Daphne has to forget about Lise and Aqua and play?
1000607562.korean: 안되거든~? 오늘 다프네는 리제도 아쿠아도 잊고 놀아야 하거든?

1000607563.english: I asked Audrey to prepare a swimsuit that would suit your sexy body... &n But today I have to have a lot of fun with my sister, right?
1000607563.korean: 오드리에게 부탁해서 그 야한 몸에 어울리는 수영복도 준비해 줬는데...&n오늘은 언니랑 완전 재밌게 놀아야 하거든?

1000607564.english: Oh, that's right! Okay! Let's get ready to have some real fun, shall we?
1000607564.korean: 오 맞는 말이야! 자자! 그럼 제대로 놀 준비를 해볼까?

1000607565.english: Okay! Are you ready, Miss Gardener?

1000607566.english: Yes? Yes?! I, I can't swim... Serpentine! Let me go!
1000607566.korean: 네? 네?! 저, 저는 수영을 못하... 서펀트 양! 놔 주세요!

1000607569.english: ... I'm so sorry, sis... I didn't know Serpent could play so roughly...
1000607569.korean: ... 언니 완전 미안... 서펀트가 그렇게 거칠게 놀 줄은 몰랐거든...

1000607570.english: Haha. It's okay. I've calmed down now. Don't worry too much, Fortune.
1000607570.korean: 후후. 괜찮아요. 이제 진정됐어요, 포츈씨도 너무 신경쓰지 마세요.

1000607571.english: Hahaha! I didn't know that gardener girl would sink like that.
1000607571.korean: 하하하! 저 정원사 아가씨가 그렇게 가라앉아 버릴 줄은 몰랐지.

1000607572.english: Serpent, is it time to laugh now?

1000607574.english: No... why is the gardener apologizing? I feel bad for nothing... &n It's okay. It's okay.
1000607574.korean: 아니... 왜 정원 관리사가 사과하는 거야? 괜히 미안하게...&n괜찮아. 괜찮아.

1000607575.english: Well, it might be hard to jump into the ocean right now, but if you ever want to learn, let me know and I'll teach you properly.
1000607575.korean: 뭐, 당장 바다로 뛰어들긴 힘들겠지만, 혹시라도 배울 생각이 있으면 내게 말해&n내가 진짜 제대로 가르쳐 줄 테니까.

1000607576.english: Uhm... I'm sorry for dragging you out for no reason... &n It seems like you don't like swimming either...
1000607576.korean: 우음... 언니가 괜히 끌고 나와서 미안하거든...&n수영도 좋아하지 않는 것 같은데...

1000607577.english: No, Mr. Fortune. I like it here. Just looking at everyone is fun enough, right?
1000607577.korean: 아녜요 포츈씨. 저는 여기가 마음에 들어요 모두를 구경하는것만으로도&n충분히 즐거운걸요?

1000607578.english: And Mr. Serpent is looking for you. Shouldn't you go? I'll rest here for a bit.
1000607578.korean: 그리고, 서펀트씨가 찾으시네요. 가보셔야 하지 않나요?&n저는 여기서 조금 쉬고 있을게요.

1000607579.english: Uhm... Then, Big Sis, I'm going to go play for a bit, but you can't go to Orca until then, right?
1000607579.korean: 우음... 그럼 언니 잠깐만 놀고 올건데, 그때까지 오르카로 가버리면 안되거든?

1000607580.english: You promised, right? I trust you and go!

1000607582.english: ...But, if I leave my seat like this... Sister Lise will come looking for me...
1000607582.korean: ... 그래도, 이렇게 자리를 비우고 있으면... 리제 언니가 찾으실텐데...

1000607583.english: Excuse me, are you Daphne? Or not...?

1000607585.english: Wow! I totally didn't recognize you because you were wearing that. Is that even 'her' work? It must have taken a lot of effort.
1000607585.korean: 우오! 그걸 입고 있어서 완전 몰라봤지 말임다. 그것도 '그분' 작품임까?&n힘이 엄청 들어갔지 말임다.

1000607586.english: Um... What are you talking about? Slow down a bit...

1000607587.english: I'm telling you. Until recently, I thought summer combat uniforms were vulgar. Now, my thoughts are gradually changing.
1000607587.korean: 저는 말임다. 얼마 전까지만해도 저는 하계전투복이 야하다고 생각했슴다.&n이제는, 생각이 점점 바뀌고 있슴다.

1000607588.english: Have you seen Captain May's too? That's just...
1000607588.korean: 혹시 메이 대장님 것도 보셨슴까? 그거 완전...

1000607589.english: Oh no! I have to go! Have fun!

1000607592.english: Hi... How are you, Night Angel?

1000607593.english: Hmm...? Nice to meet you, Daphne. But...

1000607594.english: Since you're alone, I guess the other sisters are still in Orca? &n Isn't it obvious that all three sisters were supposed to come in swimsuits together?
1000607594.korean: 혼자 계신 걸 보니, 다른 자매들은 오르카에 남아있나보군요?&n분명히 세 자매가 다 같이 수영복을 입고 오기로 한 것 아니었나요?

1000607595.english: Oh my! Can't you just leave Daphne alone? Sister, I'm worried those rough kids might bully her, so I can't even play freely.
1000607595.korean: 어휴! 다프네좀 가만 두면 안될까? 언니, 거친 애들이 다프네를 괴롭힐까 신경쓰여서&n마음대로 놀지도 못하겠거든?

1000607596.english: Hmm? I just thought the leisurely fairy was fascinating, so I spoke to her.
1000607596.korean: 음? 전 그저 여유로운 페어리가 신기해서 말을 걸어봤을 뿐인 걸요?

1000607597.english: Daphne was sweeping the bridge floor today too, wasn't she? She saw her sisters going to pick her up and couldn't stand it anymore, so she brought her here.
1000607597.korean: 다프네는 오늘도 함교 바닥 쓸고있었거든? 자매들 챙기러 가는걸 보고&n도저히 못 참고 이 언니가 데려온거거든?

1000607598.english: It's tough being with a member who holds you back.
1000607598.korean: 발목잡는 구성원과 함께 한다는건 고달픈 일이죠.

1000607599.english: Don't worry, I don't intend to bother you, Daphne.
1000607599.korean: 저도 다프네씨를 귀찮게 할 생각은 없으니, 안심하세요.

1000607600.english: Um... Then you have to get along well with Daphne. You promised, right?
1000607600.korean: 음... 그럼 다프네랑 잘 지내고 있어야해. 약속했거든?

1000607602.english: ... Fortune Technician seems to really care about Daphne.
1000607602.korean: ... 포츈 기술관은 다프네 씨를 굉장히 아끼는 것처럼 보이네요.

1000607603.english: You are such a generous person. You take care of everyone.
1000607603.korean: 참 마음이 넓으신 분이세요. 모두를 챙겨주시곤 하죠.

1000607604.english: The weather is beautiful. I feel at ease...

1000607605.english: I guess you'll understand if I take a break for a bit, right?
1000607605.korean: 잠깐 쉬는 것 정도는... 언니도 이해해 주시겠죠?

1000607606.english: Haha, well, if you ask me...

1000607607.english: Yeah, I just... I just want to rest sometimes...
1000607607.korean: 네, 그냥... 그냥 가끔씩은 저도 쉬고 싶어져서...

1000607608.english: Oh... I don't mean to say my sisters are bothering me! &n I'm just... a little tired...
1000607608.korean: 아... 자매들이 절 괴롭힌다는 뜻은 아니에요!&n그냥... 조금 피로가 쌓인 거라...

1000607609.english: It's nice to see you being honest. I like it.

1000607610.english: Since it's a rare vacation, like the Fortune Tech Center...
1000607610.korean: 모처럼의 휴가이니 만큼, 저기 포츈 기술관처럼 ...

1000607611.english: Hmm... I feel a bit bad about summoning Miss Daphne too...
1000607611.korean: 흐음... 다프네 양까지 소집하긴 좀 미안한데...

1000607612.english: Oh... Is something going on? What's going on?

1000607613.english: Captain May said she wanted to rest a little more comfortably, so she decided to eliminate the surrounding Metal Parasites in advance. She told me to gather all combat-ready troops...
1000607613.korean: 메이 대장이 조금 더 편하게 쉬고 싶다고 주위 철충들을 미리미리 없애겠다고 하더군요.&n전투 가능한 병력을 모두 모으라고...

1000607614.english: Yes, please wait a moment. I'll be ready for battle soon.
1000607614.korean: 네. 조금만 기다려 주세요. 금방 전투 준비를 마칠 게요.

1000607615.english: I'm a little sorry. &n Well, it won't take long. They're just ordinary guys.
1000607615.korean: 조금 미안하네요. &n뭐, 오래 걸리진 않을 거예요. 별 것 아닌 녀석 들이니.

1000607617.english: I've always thought... you two are really cool.
1000607617.korean: 항상 생각했지만... 두 분 정말 멋지시네요.

1000607618.english: Huh! I understand how you feel, but it's difficult to stare at me too closely. I'd like you to look elsewhere if possible.
1000607618.korean: 흥! 그 마음은 알겠지만, 너무 빤히 쳐다보면 곤란해.&n되도록 다른 곳을 봐 줬으면 좋겠어.

1000607619.english: By the way, what the hell is the Commander doing now? Surely he's not still running around in that cave?
1000607619.korean: 그건 그렇고, 사령관은 대체 지금 뭘 하고 있는거야?&n설마 아직도 그 동굴에서 뛰어다니고 있는건 아니겠지?

1000607620.english: Commander, you're enjoying your vacation in your own way. Why are you doing that?
1000607620.korean: 사령관님 나름대로 휴가를 즐기고 계시는데, 왜 그러시죠?

1000607621.english: I get that, but still... can't you at least contact me? &n No, you don't care what's going on here?
1000607621.korean: 그건 알겠는데, 그래도... 내게 연락 정도는 해줄 수 있는거 아냐?&n아니, 여기에 무슨 일이 있는지 관심이 하나도 없는 거야?

1000607622.english: Doesn't that mean... that Master trusts Captain May?
1000607622.korean: 그건... 그만큼 주인님께서, 메이 대장님을 신뢰한다는 뜻이 아닐까요?

1000607624.english: Since Captain May handles everything perfectly, Master can rest easy...
1000607624.korean: 모든 걸 완벽하게 처리하는 메이 대장님이신 만큼,&n주인님께서 마음을 놓으시고...

1000607625.english: In simple terms, it means, 'I don't really care, I'll take care of it.' The important part is 'I don't really care.'
1000607625.korean: 쉽게 말해, '알아서 잘 할테니, 별로 관심 없다.' 는 뜻이에요.&n중요한 부분은 '별로 관심 없다.' 이 부분이죠.

1000607626.english: That's an interesting interpretation.... Yeah, that's right, Angel. &n Daphne's right, I guess. I know the Commander trusts me...
1000607626.korean: 그, 그건 재밌는 해석이네.... 제, 제법이야 앤젤.&n다프네 양의 말이 맞겠지. 사령관이 나를 신뢰하는 건 알고 있으니...

1000607628.english: I need to go contact the commander. I have a suggestion for strategic deployment... so... no. Why am I explaining this?
1000607628.korean: 난 사령관에게 연락하러 가봐야겠어.&n전략적 배치에 관해 건의 할것이... 그러니까... 아니. 이걸 내가 왜 설명하고 있는거야?

1000607630.english: At this point, I feel like the captain is actually playing to my rhythm. &n Ahh... This is fun... Hehe...
1000607630.korean: 이쯤 되면, 되려 대장이 내 장단에 맞춰주는게 아닌가 싶군요.&n아아... 재밌어라... 후후...

1000607631.english: I was a little surprised. &n Hehe. You're so cute... You look just like our sisters.
1000607631.korean: 조금 놀랐어요.&n후후. 귀여우셔라... 마치 우리 자매들 같네요.

1000607632.english: By the way... What are Sister Lise and Aqua doing?
1000607632.korean: 그나저나... 리제 언니와 아쿠아는 뭘 하고 계신 걸까요?

1000607634.english: I can't stand this! This is an insult to me, the best designer ever!
1000607634.korean: 이건 참을 수 없어욧! 이건 최고의 빼쑌 디자이너인 저에 대한 모욕이라고욧!

1000607635.english: Haha! But... wouldn't that be the way to definitely capture Master?
1000607635.korean: 후후! 하지만... 그 편이 주인님을 확실히 사로잡을 수 있는 걸?

1000607636.english: There are three holes! And they're all in the women's most important areas!
1000607636.korean: 구멍이 세 개나 뚫려 있잖아요! 그것도 여성의 중요 부위만 골라서!

1000607637.english: I cut it off. And with that, I killed Master's brain! Hehe... The master will only look at me, right?
